Fellow Conservative

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=70d477646ec34fc29973c21154f296f9&_e=KtOBWlvxWqBO4SjQbdZy7YgACJ4q1s825P9teBfoYZlo1-rtKnKu4VEyUP5kgx8MtPxfejjloa9ZAxhYFpUtosXMgCCGnlZa7mOGJvywcjscdDdXte2NW1d6ykxHzhqOdyRe_mz3roz7V8TStTnOqlo9iGQazBRAgcFoOeMYxVTzGFdwScuguzC89LUJGP60dvkf8xC9pQScmAE_Dild6EI23Q-9fwpFGlkL8R00g4VneUttOYE_KEwl4k3pl11s_i1grHea8qTc6gmma_0ngD_6jbnHcnJyLjN1ZWAd7cdLR9IZytjDupxQJKU647qCvDhoCJ1aAXfzftasTVbO7uDtzTwJYQd4zZZ4x8moGw_HldwbQ89RYONusAwPClffe5TsxnA7oLEXHIncex7Ef9CzKw-kNcoR3GUW-62ajUhDmiiz63kOPvikC9xzMkk2tJ7NV71d4kJAGGCDNk1pLlymRByZm8SmVh-J0Fj7NyNtwuUvqdTgho1x7p-4gwoDg5ZbBFDgk4m34HfY2K_wrg%3D%3D)**

name: Mo Brooks
subject: 4 years ago, I was targeted in a mass shooting…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
In the aftermath of the shooting, local reporters questioned me about my support for the 2nd Amendment, ostensibly hoping to catch me shaken by the day’s violence.
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congressional_baseball&n=1)
---

| Peter, Four years ago today, a handful of my colleagues and I were at a Congressional baseball practice when a deranged lunatic opened fire seeking to kill as many Republicans as he could.

In the aftermath of the shooting, local reporters questioned me about my support for the 2nd Amendment, ostensibly hoping to catch me shaken by the day’s violence.

[**You can watch a short clip of that interview below:**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-dHTGv2tI_z_mfT6pVQB-swgME0sUwtPCzuf3BLx4H_YpH4nxzx13ceSnTV7BK3w&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congressional_baseball&n=2) ****[****](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-dHTGv2tI_z_mfT6pVQB-swgME0sUwtPCzuf3BLx4H_YpH4nxzx13ceSnTV7BK3w&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congressional_baseball&n=3 "Click here to watch.")[*****CLICK HERE TO WATCH*****](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-dHTGv2tI_z_mfT6pVQB-swgME0sUwtPCzuf3BLx4H_YpH4nxzx13ceSnTV7BK3w&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congressional_baseball&n=4 "Click here to watch!") ****[**That day, even after being targeted in a domestic terrorist attack, I still PROUDLY reaffirmed my support for our God-given right to bear arms.**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-dHTGv2tI_z_mfT6pVQB-swgME0sUwtPCzuf3BLx4H_YpH4nxzx13ceSnTV7BK3w&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congressional_baseball&n=5)

I stood for the 2nd Amendment in a sweat-soaked shirt, still fuming from being shot at earlier in the day. I stood for President Trump time and time again, despite the mainstream media and Socialist Democrats’ best attempts to cancel him and everyone around him.

I’ve stood for freedom and individual rights my entire life, and with your support, I’ll continue to do so in the U.S. Senate.

**_Will you stand with me today by donating to my campaign to_**** _STOP the SOCIALIST TAKEOVER_**** _of our country, once and for all?_** [**Your gift of $50, $100, $500, or whatever you can afford, will go directly toward our fight to put America First again.**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-dHTGv2tI_z_mfT6pVQB-swgME0sUwtPCzuf3BLx4H_YpH4nxzx13ceSnTV7BK3w&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congressional_baseball&n=6)**** Please, click the button below to donate today to show your commitment to MAGA Nation! [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-dHTGv2tI_z_mfT6pVQB-swgME0sUwtPCzuf3BLx4H_YpH4nxzx13ceSnTV7BK3w&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congressional_baseball&n=7 "Click here to help me stop the socialist takeover!") Together, we’ll restore the dignity that the Biden administration has lost, and send the Socialist Squad packing. Mo Brooks [**P.S. \- It’s time for Patriots all across this country to mobilize. There’s not a moment to waste. Your donation -- no matter the size! -- signals your support. Are you in?**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-dHTGv2tI_z_mfT6pVQB-swgME0sUwtPCzuf3BLx4H_YpH4nxzx13ceSnTV7BK3w&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congressional_baseball&n=8)

subject: Press Release - Kent Announces 200th Volunteer
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Joe Kent for Congress_
body:
Latest Press Release from Joe Kent | | | |
---
| | | **DATE: June 14, 2021**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Byron Sanford ** **Cell: 360.210.6943**
[**byron@joekentforcongress.com**](mailto:byron@joekentforcongress.com)
---
|
####
# **Joe Kent Announces 200 Volunteer Milestone **

Battle Ground, WA - Today, Candidate Joe Kent announced that the campaign now has 200 volunteers across Washington's Third Congressional District.
---
|
Candidate Joe made the following statement: “Our support continues to grow exponentially. With 200 volunteers throughout all eight counties of the Third District, we are able to reach voters in every corner of SW Washington. I am humbled by the support shown by members of the community, and look forward to the many events we have planned throughout the course of the campaign. Our volunteer coordinator, Ozzie Gonzalez, has done a tremendous job recruiting locals.

For the past few months, our volunteers have been attending gun shows, anti-lockdown protests, and local government meetings. The reception they receive from the general public is extremely encouraging. Our campaign is grassroots in its nature, and will continue to be throughout the entire campaign.”
The campaign will have a celebratory rally on Friday the 18th. The party will be at Vancouver Lake Park at 6 pm.

Candidate Joe is available for interviews. If interested, please email Byron Sanford or contact him via cell at 360.210.6943.

---
|

name: Ras Smith
subject: I’m running for Governor of Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30822782/290726331/1836405079?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210615launch1_rs_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2MxMjEzMS1kMWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZVw39P6eXPXYWy1ONOrvRYuw6FYATbBhzExRkUqBpjM=)
---
Friends, After representing the people of Iowa’s 62nd House District for five years, today I’m taking the next step in my pursuit to help unite Iowans of all walks of life, all across the state, to find solutions to our common struggles. **I’m running for Governor of Iowa.** [**If you already know me and know the kind of positive change we can create for Iowa together, add your name to support my campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30822786/290726335/317622778?refcode=fl_em_pt_20210615launch1_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2MxMjEzMS1kMWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZVw39P6eXPXYWy1ONOrvRYuw6FYATbBhzExRkUqBpjM=&emci=8c5271d8-babf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=fcc12131-d1cd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) Otherwise, let me take a minute to share my story and why I’m running to represent you. I’m a father, a husband, a public servant, a hunter, a farmer, a coach, and a counselor. My journey started with a military mom, who went on to become pastor of our local church, and a factory father, who was born on a sharecropping plantation and spent over forty years working on the assembly line at John Deere as a member of Local UAW 838. They taught me faith, the value of hard work, and how to see the world from someone else’s view. I’m a proud native of east Waterloo where I still live with my family, but feel just as much at home in rural Iowa where I spent my formative years hunting and fishing. My journey to the state house was not an easy one. Growing up, I experienced racism and prejudice firsthand, but over and over again, I also saw teachers, coaches, and even strangers stand up for me. The Iowa I know and love is one where communities take care of each other. I learned early in life that service to community is just ‘what you do.’ From training student athletes, to helping kids get their basic needs met, to counseling them and getting them across the finish line at graduation, we are stronger when we have each other’s backs. But all too often, I witnessed the government creating barriers to success instead of empowering students and families to be their best selves. And so, In 2016, I ran for the Iowa State House to bring leadership based on lived experiences to the capitol. As the ranking member of the Education committee and founder and chair of the Legislative Black Caucus, I work to bridge division, improve quality of life, and empower Iowans. The people of our state value and take pride in their work, but Iowans deserve a government that is worthy of this work. A governor who amplifies what unites us, not what divides us. Because we’re all looking for the same things: A safe community to live in and raise our families. A career that keeps a roof over our heads, and fills our days with purpose. A chance to look beyond the next paycheck and start planning for the next generation. **I believe that this moment is our greatest opportunity for change.** We can work together to create solutions that help the people of Iowa to not just survive — but to thrive. No matter what size community you live in, what party you vote for, what job you do — we’re all Iowans, and together we can write the best chapters in the story of Iowa. [**Iowa is too good to give up on and I’m ready to work with every Iowan to create the future we deserve. Will you join me in the work by adding your name in support of my campaign for governor today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30822790/290726339/317622778?refcode=fl_em_pt_20210615launch1_rs_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2MxMjEzMS1kMWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZVw39P6eXPXYWy1ONOrvRYuw6FYATbBhzExRkUqBpjM=&emci=8c5271d8-babf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=fcc12131-d1cd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) **** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30822794/290726343/317622778?refcode=fl_em_pt_20210615launch1_rs_full_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2MxMjEzMS1kMWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZVw39P6eXPXYWy1ONOrvRYuw6FYATbBhzExRkUqBpjM=&emci=8c5271d8-babf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=fcc12131-d1cd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)
---
Thank you. Let’s lace up our shoes and get to work!
— Ras

They taught me faith, the value of hard work, and how to see the world from someone else’s view. I’m a proud native of east Waterloo where I still live with my family, but feel just as much at home in rural Iowa where I spent my formative years hunting and fishing. My journey to the state house was not an easy one. Growing up, I experienced racism and prejudice firsthand, but over and over again, I also saw teachers, coaches, and even strangers stand up for me. The Iowa I know and love is one where communities take care of each other. I learned early in life that service to community is just ‘what you do.’ From training student athletes, to helping kids get their basic needs met, to counseling them and getting them across the finish line at graduation, we are stronger when we have each other’s backs. But all too often, I witnessed the government creating barriers to success instead of empowering students and families to be their best selves. And so, In 2016, I ran for the Iowa State House to bring leadership based on lived experiences to the capitol. As the ranking member of the Education committee and founder and chair of the Legislative Black Caucus, I work to bridge division, improve quality of life, and empower Iowans. The people of our state value and take pride in their work, but Iowans deserve a government that is worthy of this work. A governor who amplifies what unites us, not what divides us. Because we’re all looking for the same things: A safe community to live in and raise our families. A career that keeps a roof over our heads, and fills our days with purpose. A chance to look beyond the next paycheck and start planning for the next generation. I believe that this moment is our greatest opportunity for change. We can work together to create solutions that help the people of Iowa to not just survive — but to thrive. No matter what size community you live in, what party you vote for, what job you do — we’re all Iowans, and together we can write the best chapters in the story of Iowa. **** | Thank you. Let’s lace up our shoes and get to work! — Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. Box 1651 Waterloo, IA 50704 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: richard@blumenthal.com
subject: Missing your response about Trump's social media ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend - I wanted to make sure you saw the message I sent this past week (below). While Donald Trump's suspension from Facebook until 2023 is welcome news, it does not go far enough. The former president's incessant lying and amplifying of conspiracy theories caused serious harm to our democratic institutions - culminating in an attack on the Capitol. We must prevent him from causing any further damage.
---
But I still need 231 more people to respond to my one-question poll urging social media companies to take action. Can you please make your voice heard before our deadline at 11:59 p.m. tonight?
**Should Facebook allow Donald Trump back on its platform?**
| | | | [Yes](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trumpsmban?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1035-su-nd) | [No](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trumpsmban?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1035-su-nd)
---|---
Thank you,
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard**
Date: Thu, Jun 10, 2021
Subject: Do you want Trump on Facebook again?

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wJOivynBt7SRFpiWZAuFfk4fQ0DGYfCK&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Facebook just suspended Donald Trump from using its platform until 2023 - which means he won't be able to spread inflammatory lies, lash out at his opponents, or incite violence on the platform for the next year and a half.
This is a step forward, but it's not enough. Since November 3, 2020, Trump has continued endangering the cornerstone of our democracy by spreading his Big Lie about the election through every means available to him. Most especially on January 6, 2021, one of the darkest days in American history, when he inspired a violent mob of his supporters to storm the Capitol.
Since his social media accounts were temporarily suspended, Donald Trump has continued to spread lies - lies that, if amplified on social media, could pose serious harm to our democratic institutions. Now, Trump wants his Facebook account back to speak directly to the 81% of American adults who have an account.
**As Mark Zuckerberg considers whether to let Trump back on his platform, I 'm counting on people like you to share where you stand. We need 1,000 people to answer this one-question poll before midnight tonight, so I'm hoping to get your response right now:**
**Should Facebook allow Donald Trump back on its platform?**
| | | [Yes](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trumpsmban?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1035-su-nd) | [No](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trumpsmban?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1035-su-nd)
---|---
Thank you,
Dick

clean_body: "Tweet" Peter Ilhan Omar is a terrorist-supporting member of the Jihad Squad. It is appalling to me that Nancy Pelosi is allowing her to stay in Congress - Nancy even went on the record DEFENDING her. Why is Nancy Pelosi defending a terrorist in her party? Ilhan Omar hates America, she hates Israel, she hates everything that makes our nation free. They give her a pass when she "clarifies" her hate and anti-Semitism, and then they attack Republicans for standing up to their attempt to force tyranny and socialism on this great nation. This fight in Washington is now a simple choice between right and wrong. Do you side with those who hate our nation while enjoying its benefits, including its protection, or do you side with patriots who know that freedom needs protecting? "You must decide right now." "Smile"Ilhan may be the worst, but she is by no means the only person on the left who cheers for lawlessness and terror. AOC cheered for protestors holding signs saying, " Punch that cop." Rashida Talib has been pictured smiling with a Hezbollah terrorist after she was sworn into Congress in 2019. "Banner"They HATE our nation and everything it stands for. If Nancy Pelosi refuses to stand up to them, I will. If you love this nation and want to stop the Squad 's influence in Congress - I need you to SHOW it with an immediate donation. "Taking on the well-funded Squad won’t be easy – but nothing worth doing is." I can no longer look the other way as anti-Semitic and anti-American propaganda is spewed from the halls of Congress. "Someone needs to stand up and fight. I can’t do it alone – I need your help to counter the radical elements in Washington who want to defund our law enforcement officers and prop up BLM and other terrorists." Unlike the Jihad Squad, I love America and Israel. I greatly appreciate the police and will never allow our nation to be compared to terrorists or fund them. The Squad is the face of hatred and anti-Semitism. We cannot tolerate their actions, and that's why I've sponsored legislation to recognize the bravery of law enforcement officers who protect us from Black Lives Matter's violence and prevent the Squad from funding their friends in Hamas and other terrorist organizations. "I will not rest until the Jihad Squad terrorists are kicked out of Congress and no longer a threat to our nation; if every patriot reading this email gave just $62.31, we would have everything we need to stop them." "You need to do your part today and help me do what Nancy Pelosi is afraid to do." Thank you for your support. God Bless America, and God Bless the Nation of Israel. We need Sharif in the Senate because he’ll fight against the GOP obstruction machine and work to pass real legislation to help the people of Pennsylvania. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30832778/290762750/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzYyYWE4My1lNmNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8XZ75y_5NCpG1Z9GfJkgXKO63wuXq6VGsdj1kOU0jMY=&emci=a27dd389-dcca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e362aa83-e6cd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) | We need Sharif in the Senate because he’ll fight against the GOP obstruction machine and work to pass real legislation to help the people of Pennsylvania.
* Sharif will work with his colleagues to raise the national minimum wage
* He’ll fight to legalize cannabis and expunge the records of those arrested for nonviolent marijuana offences

Folks — I'm speechless.This past month, I watched national dark money groups – who care more about politics than anything else – pour millions into attack ads against my husband Ron and our family while he fights for you and Wisconsin. [**That's why I'm reaching out to you personally. Can you chip in $25 now to combat the attacks and fight forward for Wisconsin? >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30833866/290767783/-333842027?refcode=gopattacks-2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzQwZTE1YS1lYWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PzH-q6dQu50DYrgUQr0YUedm_3isyMtGwqWOjYwcrjA=)
**There’s a big difference between politics and public service.** Politics is trying to stop progress, public service is about moving us **FORWARD**. **Ron has one priority:** Serving you and the working families of Wisconsin. That’s public service, and it's the kind of leadership you deserve. It's why Ron served as an Assistant District Attorney and Special Prosecutor in his hometown of La Crosse, and it's why he ran for Congress. Ron's entire career is built on standing up for OUR community and OUR values. Yet these far right extremists care more about waging personal attacks, spreading lies, and playing dangerous political games than addressing the needs of everyday folks here at home. **It's time we all say enough is enough! Are you with me?** [**Can you rush $25 to fight back against the attacks on Ron and our beloved Wisconsin? Are we going to let them come into our state and stop the progress we're making for working people and families? The answer is "No way," but we have to take a stand together now. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30833874/290767805/-333842027?refcode=gopattacks-2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzQwZTE1YS1lYWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PzH-q6dQu50DYrgUQr0YUedm_3isyMtGwqWOjYwcrjA=)

clean_body: | | | | | | | = | | | | = Folks — I'm speechless.This past month, I watched national dark money groups – who care more about politics than anything else – pour millions into attack ads against my husband Ron and our family while he fights for you and Wisconsin. = There’s a big difference between politics and public service. Politics is trying to stop progress, public service is about moving us FORWARD. Ron has one priority: Serving you and the working families of Wisconsin. That’s public service, and it's the kind of leadership you deserve. It's why Ron served as an Assistant District Attorney and Special Prosecutor in his hometown of La Crosse, and it's why he ran for Congress. Ron's entire career is built on standing up for OUR community and OUR values. Yet these far right extremists care more about waging personal attacks, spreading lies, and playing dangerous political games than addressing the needs of everyday folks here at home. It's time we all say enough is enough! Are you with me? = | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = = | | = = | | | | = = | | = = | | | | = = | | = = | | | | There's too much at stake and too much left to accomplish for the working people of Wisconsin for us to just sit back and hope the other side changes its ways. They have proven time and again they will not. The evidence is clear: If we don't fight back, they won't stop. Period. = From Cumberland, where I grew up, down to Prairie du Chien, where Ron's ancestor, Julius B. Nickerson, served in the Black Hat Brigade, it's personal for us, and I can't thank you enough for standing with Ron while he's fighting for you. Sincerest thanks, Tawni Kind | | | | | | | = = | | | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . Emails are the best way to stay updated on our campaign but if you wish .

name: Team Patty
subject: Senate Republicans blocked the Paycheck Fairness Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Last week, Senate Republicans stood in the way of ensuring everyone is paid fairly for their work, regardless of their gender. But we aren’t letting them stop us in the fight for equal pay.
#
Peter,
Last week, Senate Republicans stood in the way of ensuring everyone is paid fairly for their work, regardless of their gender. But we aren’t letting them stop us in the fight for equal pay.
**[In 2022, we need to defend every single Democratic champion fighting for paycheck fairness, including Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock, Catherine Cortez Masto, and Tammy Duckworth. Will you rush in a $5 contribution to keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30836771/290779122/-438381770?refcode=pm_em_210615_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI5YzkxMC1mMWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S4FCb26i_aUcwObnuzkOaiDnZwHWrLJsaTS0gRGWBlQ=)**
The gender wage gap exists in every single state in our country and is shortchanging women and their families. It’s just shameful that Republicans are _STILL_ working overtime to block equal pay.
That’s why it is so crucial that we not only expand our majority in the next election, but support all of our Democratic incumbents who’ll keep fighting until the gender pay gap is finally closed.
**[Patty Murray will stay in the fight as long as it takes -- and she needs strong Democratic Senators like Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock, Catherine Cortez Masto, and Tammy Duckworth beside her. Can you pitch in $5 to protect our Democratic majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30836772/290779123/-438381770?refcode=pm_em_210615_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI5YzkxMC1mMWNkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S4FCb26i_aUcwObnuzkOaiDnZwHWrLJsaTS0gRGWBlQ=)**
Thank you,
Team Patty

Ron Johnson doesn’t care about Wisconsinites, Peter. Need proof? When asked if he'd support bipartisan infrastructure legislation that would rebuild our roads, reinvest in our middle class, boost job training programs, and expand broadband access, he said he’d do what he could “to frustrate its passage."

name: Larry Klayman
subject: Wuhan coverup exposed
body:
Over a year ago, Freedom Watch filed a class action lawsuit against the People's Republic of China for manufacturing and releasing Coronavirus onto the world - and devasting the lives of millions of Americans.
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SDWK3e5qPjZWYqUhg8hWaQ/ZghN5hasD2ImHA1Tz34vgw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Freedom Watch.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SDWK3e5qPjZWYqUhg8hWaQ/ZghN5hasD2ImHA1Tz34vgw)**.
---

---
| [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SDWK3e5qPjZWYqUhg8hWaQ/ZghN5hasD2ImHA1Tz34vgw)
Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SDWK3e5qPjZWYqUhg8hWaQ/ZghN5hasD2ImHA1Tz34vgw) Over a year ago, Freedom Watch filed a class action lawsuit against the People's Republic of China for manufacturing and releasing Coronavirus onto the world - and devasting the lives of millions of Americans.

At the time, I was called a "wing nut" and "conspiracy theorist" even though our researchers had proven undeniable evidence that COVID-19 originated at the Wuhan Institute of Virology.

[**Now, it 's proven and you can still join and support our lawsuit here.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SDWK3e5qPjZWYqUhg8hWaQ/ZghN5hasD2ImHA1Tz34vgw)

**Over 1,000 Americans have replied that they want to join our lawsuit as plaintiffs.**

It took researchers from Sweden and Paris to track down the origins of COVID-19 while the debunked the official narrative from by the Communist Chinese Government and our own that virus labs are "air tight" and an outbreak is impossible.

**Since 2004, there have been FOUR separate SARS-related lab breaches.**

Also to their credit, the traditionally liberal magazine, _Vanity Fair_ , pursued the truth and got their hands on a **State Department memo that warned bureau chiefs "not to pursue an investigation into the origin of COVID-19" because it would "open a can of worms if it continued."**

That's because our government funded the Wuhan lab . . .

This isn't a can of worms, it's a Pandora's Box and Freedom Watch will hold the People's Republic of China responsible for the deaths of nearly 600,000 Americans and the millions more who have been financially harmed by the pandemic.

Several lawsuits have been filed against China about this already . . . **but Freedom Watch 's lawsuit is the only one that remains active in the courts**.
[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SDWK3e5qPjZWYqUhg8hWaQ/ZghN5hasD2ImHA1Tz34vgw)
As a matter of fact, a federal judge has ordered our filings served to the Chinese Embassy . . . and they have flat out refused service.

**So, the State Department will be served and will be required to formally serve the government of China with our class action lawsuit.**

Just like the Iranian regime ducked and dodged the lawsuit over the Lockerbie bombing and lost to the tune of $1.75 BILLION - China will do the same and then some.

We have to be prepared for a ferocious fight against the Communist Chinese and that's why [**I 'm asking for your support**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SDWK3e5qPjZWYqUhg8hWaQ/ZghN5hasD2ImHA1Tz34vgw).

Simple attempting to serve Chinese officials have cost us thousands of dollars. And now that it's KNOWN that COVID-19 originated from their lab, I expect them to use every play in the book to stall and bleed our legal funds in the hopes that we go away.

But they don't know me.

As the founder of Judicial Watch and now Freedom Watch, the Clintons tried that tactic on me for eight years - it never came close to working.

I don't give up. I don't stop fighting, and I'm asking you to stand by my side so we can keep fighting.

[**Please, donate all that you can here and my staff will be in contact if you 're interested in joining the 1,000 other Americans who have joined our case.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SDWK3e5qPjZWYqUhg8hWaQ/ZghN5hasD2ImHA1Tz34vgw)

Respectfully,

Larry Klayman, Esq
Chairman and General Counsel
Freedom Watch
[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SDWK3e5qPjZWYqUhg8hWaQ/ZghN5hasD2ImHA1Tz34vgw)
---
(C) 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/65YjetHDquW7oachkvxtQQ/ZghN5hasD2ImHA1Tz34vgw)

name: James Hartnett
subject: Need you now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi Peter, it’s James.
Putting together a winning campaign is hard work, so that is why Stewart announced early. Thanks to folks like yourself, we’re laying the foundation for a winning campaign by talking to voters, running digital ads, and so much more. This district is one of our best chances to expand our majority in 2022, so there is no doubt huge sums of special interest money will pour into our race.
That’s why it’s so critical that we perform well on our public FEC report at the end of the month. We set an ambitious mid-month goal to keep us on track, so I’m asking for 200 donations of $10 before midnight to get us back to where we need to be to hit our $4,000 goal by midnight. Will you step up today with a $10 donation? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210615-email&amount=10]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210615-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210615-email]
Time is flying. And whether it feels like it or not, the 2022 Elections are here.
Help us get back on track so that we can send Stewart to Congress by chipping in $25 right now! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210615-email&amount=25]
Thanks, y’all!
Best,

VOTE NOW -- I want to hear what you think. Is President Trump still the leader of the Republican Party? We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Fellow Conservative

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=04a7103b1a1b4530957bd95160dfee16&_e=psZxPDpSh2wBj-AYvhHEaC8Yw_ruzbrNauNZvGqrESFioSbfFu7WkDyPnBS6FwrbMe7y4IZ42Y6k51Pa907uwaDg6O_JD3goyp8wL9ESuwt1lWtpV2ZEDk4pFH8Vb9WpO0R1AJhb8m4F5MpuUziEmaQ4vB8Av4pa-TvoWawlNwC4te2sg7-fhmocAI9YWrQWTri9qAW0IXtZEllo2ucL_Qk-4waYd7Fk5vwn4Xf1yoR2thAaCrESQk6LBZwW18JvLXkm_-pwsYagdn_CJ7uWkigab8RmWs5SoRtjX9pBOjd4A_-dSGoBrGEXkUnWGsYznEo9Zk-ZQDbOUh0AO8Hr9ue83WRKqk2K5m7KAulzic2WKKdrHp9_-bJ0xAqRViJQMOuHVbTtrfdeF55i8q_IrR9YMv5IKcgbDxdfU2EgyTzcuI_pv6Zsr4j4zC-KsbS-OW5db00xYKzO1MWqU0coPoyaCOON1iNyz_ZkSdwTCqpDNwbdejbdzF6dSsXIm5pJY3zzJsu2eows4UWYUbLGMQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: VOTE NOW -- I want to hear what you think. Is President Trump still the leader of the Republican Party? We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now? | Fellow Conservative Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 1,000 votes short. Fellow Conservative, your name is not on my list as having voted. no response will result in an automatic NO selction You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year’s midterm elections. We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership - including President Trump - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year. | For freedom, Jim Jordan Don't want to receive our emails? | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

clean_body: We know firsthand the power of this team. | Peter - President Biden’s American Rescue Plan was the first step on our country’s road to recovery after the horrible last four years. Now we’re moving to the next step: building support for President Biden’s legislative agenda and electing Democrats nationwide. Because building back better relies on holding our majority in the House and gaining more seats in the Senate. We’re doing everything we can to make sure that we continue our electoral success of 2020 — running ads to support President Biden in states critical to the midterm elections. Now we’re relying on your support ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline. = = We have to spread President Biden’s message and show voters exactly what he’s done to make Americans’ lives better. That’s how we’ll get Democrats to the polls in 2022 — by showing them exactly how much is at stake if we don’t keep the pressure on. But our critical work cannot happen without you. Failing to hit our mid-month goal in 48 hours would be detrimental down the road. Now is the time to make crucial investments in ads to ensure every voter knows what President Biden has accomplished for Americans. Friend,

Socialism is on the rise again.

Schools are teaching Critical Race Theory to young kids, which all critical theories derive from Marxian critique of our society.

Corporations are fully embracing Woke ideology 11actively dismantling our culture and our shared values.

Culture is downstream of politics. Which is why conservatives, libertarians, and pro-liberty Americans don’t seem to have an answer to the Woke takeover of corporations.

However, I have good news too.

The United States has defeated socialism on a global scale before. **It’s our duty to defeat socialism again through education, activism, and culture.**

_[**Can you rush your support today to the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE)?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3367%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ObH3Zx0ZrDxhUUk249u4sg&sysid=1)_

Since 1946, the Foundation for Economic Education has been on the frontlines of the battle of ideas, fighting against socialism by educating and equipping young Americans with economic truths.
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3368%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zTEgX1PZrUP8GtzDd4d8lQ&sysid=1) _Senior FEE staff in the early 1950s - You may recognize pro-liberty heroes such as Henry Hazlitt and Ludwig Von Mises._
FEE has been home to some of liberty’s greatest thinkers. FEE’s legacy includes the landmark works of writers who dared to go against the popularity of socialism during their time:
* Leonard Read’s _I, Pencil_
* Henry Hazlitt’s _Economics in One Lesson_
* Ludwig von Mises’ _Human Action_
* Translated and republished Frederic Bastiat’s _The Law_

Each of these leading thinkers helped to stop the rise of socialism that was very popular, especially among the elite and academics (similar to today). And FEE continues to this day to challenge and refute any forms of collectivism that re-emerge in academia or popular culture.

[**Friend****, before I continue on with exactly what we are doing to combat the rise of socialism, I want to personally ask you for a favor. All online donations are being MATCHED by one of our top supporters.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3369%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n3GwpC%2ffYL8lT56qLc4chQ&sysid=1)

Through FEE’s newly launched “Henry Hazlitt Project for Educational Journalism,” we are developing the “Henry Hazlitt’s of today”: the next generation of great free-market thinkers and communicators when they are needed more than ever.

**Let’s be honest, most journalism nowadays is merely woke, social justice activism**.

With a new rise of socialism, collectivism, and “wokeism,” FEE is continuing to once again develop and equip the next wave of the rising generation’s pro-liberty writers, influencers, journalists, and leaders.

Fellow of the Hazlitt Project will lead the charge in meaningfully shifting our national discourse towards free-market solutions by speaking to each rising generation with confidence and authority on the most pressing issues facing our country.

Through written articles, social media, videos, and podcasts, these talented young Americans serve as critical communicators--ardently defending the bedrock principles of liberty among their peers in the battle of ideas.

_[**Support FEE’s Hazlitt Project Today by clicking here to donate >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3377%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NC0SGj%2f0RJPHDpPVtnzQGw&sysid=1)_

His testimony before the US Senate earlier this year on the damage done by COVID lockdowns was powerful. Rooting young Americans in the foundational principles of free enterprise and limited government--and demonstrating how these ideas can be practically applied to address the issues facing society today--is a critical step in ensuring their implementation in public policy, politics, business, and communities, and ultimately in preserving and promoting prosperity for future generations. **Hazlitt Project Fellows are being uniquely equipped to lead this charge.**

In liberty,

Zilvinas Silenas
President
Foundation for Economic Education

P.S. Please do not hesitate to take action.

name: Josh Harder
subject: one of the most vulnerable seats in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/LV5yII5T_YH99T6vGbM1eCfgY8JMZixUth1E5CwiVCo=) | _As a critical supporter of Democrats, we wanted to alert you to this vital toss-up House race. Josh Harder has been serving California 's 10th District in Congress since he flipped this battleground seat from red to blue in 2018. He fended off a challenge from a Trump-loving Republican in 2020, but now this seat is a top target for national republicans in 2022 as they look to take back control of the House. We hope you'll join us in the fight to protect our House majority in one of the nation's most competitive races, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/Mb76Nw6VBJufCkuqdezyU-Ixv8THZA7-f-9P_RAhQ34=) at any time._ Peter,

I never thought I would run for office, but here I am serving as the Congressman for California's 10th District. At 34, I'm one of the youngest people to ever serve in Congress. Not many folks thought we could win by refusing corporate PAC dollars. But we made history in 2018 when we flipped this Republican-held district, and again in 2020 when we fended off a challenge from a Trump-loving Republican.

In Congress, I am keeping the promises I made to voters: stay true to my progressive beliefs and be relentless in getting them accomplished. I'm a leading voice for campaign finance reform. I'm continuing to advocate for Medicare for All. I'm standing up for DREAMers. And I may have gone viral once or twice speaking truth to power against Trump and Betsy DeVos.

But because of my outspokenness, **I 'm already a top target for Republicans for 2022.** My district is split 50/50 with Trump and Biden voters and Republicans see the opportunity to flip it this year. In fact, my district was one of the only California toss-up districts that didn't flip red in 2020.

**Holding this seat won 't be easy, but we can't afford to back down -- not when so much of our progress and control of the House is at stake.**

I'm looking forward to keeping you in the loop on our fight to keep CA-10 blue. I won't back down and we're ready to win.

-- Josh
Congressman for California's 10th District [](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/Cu6Kq_32hgV2vrei7gMu-8XmFdSHJs46p6LGmsZNAu0=?refcode=E6700-20210310-Warmup1ES-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10) [MEET JOSH](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/LV5yII5T_YH99T6vGbM1eCfgY8JMZixUth1E5CwiVCo=)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/Cu6Kq_32hgV2vrei7gMu-8XmFdSHJs46p6LGmsZNAu0=?refcode=E6700-20210310-Warmup1ES-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/NfxiY0UkM4rlC_7Hd6OsWY6MRTN7TFrzlcBpFLYKGvs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/80GjoS1FsHtQI_UT7VHen7QFlR-_8P0AFfOUViawEvg=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/RzLqwScwwD_Nz8gdklc4346kUhw1-vG_vJq1JWFyfak=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/Mb76Nw6VBJufCkuqdezyU-Ixv8THZA7-f-9P_RAhQ34=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/Cu6Kq_32hgV2vrei7gMu-8XmFdSHJs46p6LGmsZNAu0=?refcode=E6700-20210310-Warmup1ES-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/RNt2lsj6adnWefQj3DP1C1PSTy49HJaCRMW1dicUj6Y=/Cu6Kq_32hgV2vrei7gMu-8XmFdSHJs46p6LGmsZNAu0=?refcode=E6700-20210310-Warmup1ES-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values.

Harder for Congress

Modesto CA 95352 United States

The 'woke' media is back at it again.
This time the New York Times Editorial Board's Mara Gay was offended when she visited Long Island and saw Pro-Trump and American flags. While on MSNBC, she even called the Stars and Stripes racist and disturbing.
Clearly, the 'woke' media is a little triggered when it comes to being around America First patriots that don't subscribe to their radical ideology.

Friends, Ras Smith wears a lot of shoes: he’s a state representative, a father, a husband, a hunter, a farmer, a coach, and a counselor. **And now, he’s running to become Governor of Iowa.** **[Click to watch his official launch video explaining why, then pitch in $5 or more to become a founding donor of our grassroots campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30853119/290822608/-1891813345?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210615launch2_tr_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmU2OGFlYy0wZWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KmCl953nOi1_FYacABy-Zqs8hSrnE5WwHWqofe2C2OI=)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30853120/290822611/-1532682824?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210615launch2_tr_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmU2OGFlYy0wZWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KmCl953nOi1_FYacABy-Zqs8hSrnE5WwHWqofe2C2OI=)

Ras knows we are all defined less by the shoes we wear, and more by what we’re working for. No matter the differences, we’re all looking for solutions to our common struggles and searching for the same things:
A safe community to live and raise our families.
Opportunities to succeed, no matter where you live or where you come from.
The chance to look beyond the next paycheck and start planning for the next generation.
**Working for a better life. For a better Iowa. That’s what unites us.**
At the end of the day, we’re all on this journey together. Ras knows Iowa’s best days are ahead of us, and he’s ready to lead us on the path to progress and unity.
**[This is Day 1 of our campaign, and there’s a long road ahead of us. Will you support Ras today by pitching in a contribution of any amount to become a founding donor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30853122/290822613/-1891813345?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210615launch2_tr_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmU2OGFlYy0wZWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KmCl953nOi1_FYacABy-Zqs8hSrnE5WwHWqofe2C2OI=)**

clean_body: Ras Smith wears a lot of shoes: he’s a state representative, a father, a husband, a hunter, a farmer, a coach, and a counselor. And now, he’s running to become Governor of Iowa. | = Friends, Ras Smith wears a lot of shoes: he’s a state representative, a father, a husband, a hunter, a farmer, a coach, and a counselor. And now, he’s running to become Governor of Iowa. = | = Ras knows we are all defined less by the shoes we wear, and more by what we’re working for. No matter the differences, we’re all looking for solutions to our common struggles and searching for the same things: A safe community to live and raise our families. Opportunities to succeed, no matter where you live or where you come from. The chance to look beyond the next paycheck and start planning for the next generation. Working for a better life. For a better Iowa. That’s what unites us. At the end of the day, we’re all on this journey together. Ras knows Iowa’s best days are ahead of us, and he’s ready to lead us on the path to progress and unity. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Like Ras says: let’s lace up our shoes and get to work. — Team Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. Peter, our friends at the Fetterman Fund sent you this email last week, and we wanted to make sure you saw it. Our team here at Secure the Senate has highlighted this race as one of the best pick-up opportunities in the midterm elections.
We are at a critical moment in our democracy's history. And if we are to have any hope of defending our democracy from the GOP, then we need to fight for bold progressives like John Fetterman. That fight starts now. We're counting on our grassroots army to join us to take back this critical seat. Chip in today and help us fight for John Fetterman, take back Pennsylvania, and expand our Senate majority. [Here's the link to give: Donate $25 today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30853559/290823875/-2125726282?refcode=OUT_20210615_GEN_FDR_G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzYzA4ODEwLTEwY2UtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7BUMmc2yI4MEiAKGNnbT0DRKUGUvOs__nUdNkExu4KU=)
Thank you for being in this fight,
When Democrats Turn Out

Date: Tue, June 15, 2021
Subject: Elect Democrats with the courage to end the filibuster

|

| | Hi Peter, John Fetterman is right: Joe Manchin must open his eyes to reality. Republicans in the Senate have a vested interest in eroding voting rights across the country. The simple truth is that the future of our democracy is at stake, and now is not the time to pretend that Republicans will turn over a new leaf and be interested in bipartisan compromise any time soon. But Joe Manchin isn't listening. He refuses to support the For The People Act \-- a bill he co-sponsored just two years ago \-- and he's refusing to take any action on the filibuster. While others continue to focus on persuading Manchin away from his position, we're preparing for the 2022 midterms. John Fetterman is running to replace retiring GOP Senator Pat Toomey, and Fetterman would give the Democrats a tremendous shot at EXPANDING our majority in the next Congress. Fetterman is a bold progressive who understands that Republicans are making a steady yet relentless march towards authoritarianism, and Fetterman is up for stopping them in their tracks. | **[FUND FETTERMAN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30853560/290823876/-2125726282?refcode=OUT_20210615_GEN_FDR_G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzYzA4ODEwLTEwY2UtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7BUMmc2yI4MEiAKGNnbT0DRKUGUvOs__nUdNkExu4KU=)**
---

Fetterman knows the January 6 insurrection was just the beginning of GOP-sanctioned attempts to subvert our democracy. And he knows that if we can't pass basic protections for our right to vote, then we will face catastrophic losses in elections for generations to come.

**[Peter, we're taking action. We're fighting for John Fetterman and other candidates with the moral fortitude to act at this critical juncture in our nation's history. But we can't do it alone, and we need our entire grassroots movement behind us. So we're asking: Can you chip in $10, $25, or anything at all today to help us fuel our Fetterman Fund?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30853561/290823877/-2125726282?refcode=OUT_20210615_GEN_FDR_G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzYzA4ODEwLTEwY2UtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7BUMmc2yI4MEiAKGNnbT0DRKUGUvOs__nUdNkExu4KU=)**

This fight will be hard, but we know we can win it with you alongside us.

**[ELECT FETTERMAN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30853568/290823884/-2125726282?refcode=OUT_20210615_GEN_FDR_G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzYzA4ODEwLTEwY2UtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7BUMmc2yI4MEiAKGNnbT0DRKUGUvOs__nUdNkExu4KU=)**

We're stepping up. Will you? name: Mike Collier
subject: I wanted to take a moment to explain what happened yesterday
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayers
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
Hello team —

I make my living working in the energy industry, so I wanted to take a moment to explain what happened yesterday when our rickety power grid nearly failed again.

As Monday began, several natural-gas-fired power plants unexpectedly went offline all across the state. Suddenly, our grid was short 12,000 megawatts of electricity — enough to power nearly 2.4 million homes.

As temperatures continued to rise throughout the day, electricity usage went higher and higher and diminished our reserve margin of electricity to levels that led ERCOT to call on all Texans to reduce their power usage.

Once again, in the energy capital of the world, we were dangerously close to not having enough electricity to power countless homes. To say we're the laughing stock of the world is an understatement.

Here's the question everyone wants to know the answer to: Why does this keep happening? To put it bluntly, our grid was deregulated 20 years ago by people who didn’t know what in god’s name they were doing. It was a poorly designed grid even then, with its flaws becoming increasingly more clear with time. Our grid is in desperate need of modernization — it has not kept up with technology or our rapid growth as a state.

And folks, we haven’t seen the worst of it yet. With climate change rapidly approaching, our grid will face even more pressure in the years to come. Higher temperatures will drive up usage like we saw yesterday. Storms and hurricanes will require more frequent and expensive grid repairs. And our current grid just isn't caught up to date on the future of renewable energy sources, all paid for by taxpayers.

And all of this will cost us jobs. I have heard firsthand from CEOs who are thinking twice about relocating their businesses to Texas — because who wants to do business in a state where they can't count on the lights turning on?

The truth is, we could’ve prevented this from happening, but our leadership refuses to invest in our future by updating our power grid.

Energy experts warned Dan Patrick and the State Legislature years ago about the dismal state of our grid, and they did nothing. Then, this year, we had a devastating storm that left nearly 700 Texans dead, and they did nothing.

Enough is enough. Texans deserve better, and if I decide to take on Dan Patrick, I will fight to ensure our power grid is ready for the future, not stuck in the past. Patrick can't keep the lights on in Texas, so in 2022, we can turn the lights off on his political career.

— Mike
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States
[https://collierfortexas.com/] |
Paid for by the Collier Committee
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We believe that emails are the best way to connect with our supporters and keep you up-to-date. However, if you’d still like to receive fewer emails, fill out this form here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2abP63YYcUqXP5eHRkxWIQ2]. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b2228b37-11ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/b27df176-11ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjdkZjE3Ni0xMWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y1LG65NgnUTcRSJH7EE5CmXgykmMdh-ilav-K7ba9Go=&id=109059170]

name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: 6,588 votes from victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c9d7c72f6ad6497ca6df62e257f09056&_e=OwiJRwQCR40eFR19xKHFkSrG0_Jc0_cCOqVY-ANdQCvokKh_DeC9OcjnB6QsFpfW1zUaV-f6rPLqt1LmcyzG978kIJIaDPL8_0um-SKFSzGXx9OkMLcqkNB9qNkpsc-gP0SgSDakTJ7LuyIY5ktyRDPLvSgFAcHaynd1me46zzdhf8HOrltf7JihO1pp7cJRSyfxNsEDaYXgCxj0xC2e8mT8XCtgbk74ygw5Y3imEQvtxLVrDzwL_Ncr1qED6S6EIdQ7u60z07S8xmS1euXM2rBk5n8ctaZ_YjXQO9lpNVS-d8D1On1pcvEZ_wWfyQaQzeqSP2ShWg2IJezxB37G6dfamZhK2LaHxxQLTwdLT0YaqYe0ZL-Q0k4XWDjtmt6YOMpgxwOc1teQEOygOZ4HzgZp2daYu46gTcCnWaNeFMBDLu7i-2T2KLSX_CwRPZ3e8hEq3dr2gQzxmVAWOnOtAB4EXAG0ODd0PhqGTJeQKhA%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c9d7c72f6ad6497ca6df62e257f09056&_e=OwiJRwQCR40eFR19xKHFkSrG0_Jc0_cCOqVY-ANdQCvokKh_DeC9OcjnB6QsFpfW1zUaV-f6rPLqt1LmcyzG978kIJIaDPL8_0um-SKFSzGXx9OkMLcqkNB9qNkpsc-gP0SgSDakTJ7LuyIY5ktyRDPLvSgFAcHaynd1me46zzdhf8HOrltf7JihO1pp7cJRSyfxNsEDaYXgCxj0xC2e8mT8XCtgbk74ygw5Y3imEQvtxLVrDzwL_Ncr1qED6S6EIdQ7u60z07S8xmS1euXM2h7wx_NvMwHTrQ42d0rZKXj7u15pdCwBmVmLdC-GVzjyIVV1zdMXovFromnhwp-AYOiVacqS7EthEsWz9s85IMXQTdsPM6ptbQLtRlLi7auzpSQFu2RbJLt9jlMYYKfqIbgk5BW5YtZfQijY_UvOwDOHfVn6a_ASl61hZYibtPcT5MbCBhMJWXnnJv3dOuoow20tmJN-EBCDhNzLed0IstA%3D)

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip in Today! ⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c9d7c72f6ad6497ca6df62e257f09056&_e=OwiJRwQCR40eFR19xKHFkSrG0_Jc0_cCOqVY-ANdQCvokKh_DeC9OcjnB6QsFpfW1zUaV-f6rPLqt1LmcyzG978kIJIaDPL8_0um-SKFSzGXx9OkMLcqkNB9qNkpsc-gP0SgSDakTJ7LuyIY5ktyRDPLvSgFAcHaynd1me46zzdhf8HOrltf7JihO1pp7cJRSyfxNsEDaYXgCxj0xC2e8mT8XCtgbk74ygw5Y3imEQvtxLVrDzwL_Ncr1qED6S6EIdQ7u60z07S8xmS1euXM2k0fgtJG9T953qIoJMaU7iW1M6YvT2T04tXnWG1WwlrItR6hkviQEtonwDEf4rbJ4A6evutg_A0clZOKbnbLPC-5s_IseZbj204EakHK2-n0kZynVt46Au1BrNIcm4yVj8M4WMInnnFEUPxv2nOhR9sxrLOGCZ-X-2Nab1tht3rMXLAe7GmbUSkFwdZN_9n-9ok08pY9C85wr55IDqkjGJo%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c9d7c72f6ad6497ca6df62e257f09056&_e=OwiJRwQCR40eFR19xKHFkSrG0_Jc0_cCOqVY-ANdQCvokKh_DeC9OcjnB6QsFpfW1zUaV-f6rPLqt1LmcyzG978kIJIaDPL8_0um-SKFSzGXx9OkMLcqkNB9qNkpsc-gP0SgSDakTJ7LuyIY5ktyRDPLvSgFAcHaynd1me46zzdhf8HOrltf7JihO1pp7cJRSyfxNsEDaYXgCxj0xC2e8mT8XCtgbk74ygw5Y3imEQvtxLVrDzwL_Ncr1qED6S6EIdQ7u60z07S8xmS1euXM2nEeHn3ZQXsn3Yt-hQ4LAFLOhPEc6bQHOvl77y0FbIpGasmdbLWYgxn8nWb08WSnQEZZV-ePRi8N0ONf9FJsx6zLSi5nhppKMrP_Z-zH-7Rnp55SEPsiBsjchk7w_pYGz9ku7yxpadMaNOy5xfHp2MG0sC6l7h39recQyOa9FMmf5NbYiZq243D3mO7xUHi9jNf3rUy_71t6dWUPro5pOkY%3D)

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip in Today! ⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c9d7c72f6ad6497ca6df62e257f09056&_e=OwiJRwQCR40eFR19xKHFkSrG0_Jc0_cCOqVY-ANdQCvokKh_DeC9OcjnB6QsFpfW1zUaV-f6rPLqt1LmcyzG978kIJIaDPL8_0um-SKFSzGXx9OkMLcqkNB9qNkpsc-gP0SgSDakTJ7LuyIY5ktyRDPLvSgFAcHaynd1me46zzdhf8HOrltf7JihO1pp7cJRSyfxNsEDaYXgCxj0xC2e8mT8XCtgbk74ygw5Y3imEQvtxLVrDzwL_Ncr1qED6S6EIdQ7u60z07S8xmS1euXM2sm7zlFZd7xcUhsl_-bEGEDNn432LA2xjcq_k2hQByHA-OFZzecGIqHhW69898XrgG1HYCA7Yo16lcOyMnGoMk_eCROLqQXt_mOizzkzugZ4xNiG1IKkaSVzg7OBYNQB0QxCj_rcq27DBnAvRz9rlKcTxpXBQbC_W2uKiz5q5WvmJijtQBrVW3lkExRQybqcabtI05t4-BGkjtX89eWZhd0%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c9d7c72f6ad6497ca6df62e257f09056&_e=OwiJRwQCR40eFR19xKHFkSrG0_Jc0_cCOqVY-ANdQCvokKh_DeC9OcjnB6QsFpfW1zUaV-f6rPLqt1LmcyzG978kIJIaDPL8_0um-SKFSzGXx9OkMLcqkNB9qNkpsc-gP0SgSDakTJ7LuyIY5ktyRDPLvSgFAcHaynd1me46zzdhf8HOrltf7JihO1pp7cJRSyfxNsEDaYXgCxj0xC2e8mT8XCtgbk74ygw5Y3imEQvtxLVrDzwL_Ncr1qED6S6EIdQ7u60z07S8xmS1euXM2klPYEvfzn04mx0u1zNm3OgMHZW5MURTmr4BLdmVNLaBvRVA3mm7oyN1sHWve8-X2R7ocFc44U9ueeGhLkYyMUHTgSaW78a5m2tplIH7__uK9dwU-btP1YpLakiQ-TsYRBUaDctXpzm_EV1nJUyjaToovyf36bTkTqmoyIp7n-WEYZzwhrx9Uo03C3N0yolptq8Uj5PHXO_hP1Kr1faszu8%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c9d7c72f6ad6497ca6df62e257f09056&_e=OwiJRwQCR40eFR19xKHFkSrG0_Jc0_cCOqVY-ANdQCvokKh_DeC9OcjnB6QsFpfW1zUaV-f6rPLqt1LmcyzG978kIJIaDPL8_0um-SKFSzGXx9OkMLcqkNB9qNkpsc-gP0SgSDakTJ7LuyIY5ktyRDPLvSgFAcHaynd1me46zzdhf8HOrltf7JihO1pp7cJRSyfxNsEDaYXgCxj0xC2e8mT8XCtgbk74ygw5Y3imEQvtxLVrDzwL_Ncr1qED6S6EIdQ7u60z07S8xmS1euXM2sB_FV5H08BQt9dAS4wG3V95cgQo1dmqycnzUTPBFmHz-N_H9PqMcGoOyKDlFPW6FX3A1c_K2vUhBsE28Xxug2Ubka4tk_zTte1-zALc0oWx7UDOnyd6knugAKyO0wR2dIiqBy5KyjffOpMXjsFxanUrPRSMFjj_WA5sX4BSZEFRK6sGtF9zOcyi6eD6uJS_RmUgZMhTYoqvNenMjWZKrIA%3D)

name: Tony Hoang
subject: Pride
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Hey there — it’s Tony Hoang. I’m the Executive Director of
Equality California, and I’m reaching out today to ask you to support us
and Senator Alex Padilla as we work together to create a world that is
healthy, just, and fully equal for all LGBTQ+ people.

It’s Pride Month, and here at Equality California we are working hard with
Senators like Alex Padilla to make real progress by passing the Equality
Act.

Californians deserve a champion in the US Senate who will fight for LGBTQ+
civil rights, and Alex Padilla is that champion.

Whether it’s creating a pathway to citizenship, fighting for the Equality
Act, or protecting transgender Californians at the polls, Senator Padilla
has never shied away from fighting for our progressive values.

And right now we have an opportunity to make history! Millions of
Americans would benefit from the passage of the Equality Act. With your
support today, we can show Congress that there’s undeniable support for
this bill.

[ http://act.alex-padilla.com/go/22?t=1001&akid=88%2E159979%2EgNUv6Q ]So please, I need your help. Will you add your name to our
petition and demand that Congress pass the Equality Act now?

ADD YOUR NAME

It is unacceptable that LGBTQ+ Americans still do not have equal
protections from discrimination in our country.

Senator Padilla is working to fix that. He isn’t just a passive supporter
of LGBTQ+ civil rights and social justice, but a full-throated champion
who takes on our struggle as his own.

We cannot stop fighting until we pass the Equality Act and create a world
that is healthy, just, and fully equal for all LGBTQ+ people.

That’s why this is so important, and why I have to ask one more time:

[ http://act.alex-padilla.com/go/22?t=1002&akid=88%2E159979%2EgNUv6Q ]Will you add your name to our petition and tell Congress you support
the Equality Act?

I hope you’ll consider joining us and adding your name,

Tony Hoang
Incoming Executive Director
Equality California

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=88%2E159979%2EgNUv6Q

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Midnight Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — It’s Emma Brown, Mark’s campaign manager.
We’ve been reaching out to you a lot recently about our 10,000 contribution goal. I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why this goal is so important — especially now.
This week, two new Republican candidates just announced they are running against Mark in 2022 — that’s three opponents total. And then, The Hill named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. These are just the latest signs that things are heating up and hitting these goals is even more crucial.
That’s why every donation we receive before midnight will help keep us on track to reach our 100,000 contribution goal by the end of the month so we can hold this seat. **So here’s the part where I ask for your help:**
[**Will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? Every donation we receive before our deadline at midnight will be put right to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210615-1-15&t=1&refcode2=802_6688874_7ram3Y&akid=802%2E6688874%2E7ram3Y)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210615-1-15&t=2&refcode2=802_6688874_7ram3Y&akid=802%2E6688874%2E7ram3Y)**
Every time we’ve needed your help to prepare or respond to an attack on our campaign, you’ve been there.
And your support is so important — especially right now.
So I can’t thank you enough for your continued support, it means so much to Mark and all of us on Team Kelly.
All of my best,
—Emma
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210615-1-15&t=3&refcode2=802_6688874_7ram3Y&akid=802%2E6688874%2E7ram3Y)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=802%2E6688874%2E7ram3Y).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

>

[**I'm proud to support him and I'm asking you to join me by contributing to his campaign right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30855688/290834200/-2023814932?refcode=20210615.4_TK_6BI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODg1ZDQxMC0xN2NlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFHiqUvisP0yO4F5FnlnPymZ21GzPQMBf1rPG1ChmKQ=)
>
> It’s hard to put into words just how important it is for Terry to win this November. Terry’s opponent Glenn Youngkin is a former private equity executive who said he’s willing to spend up to $75 million to buy a place in the Governor’s office.
>
> Derek, Youngkin isn’t just endorsed by Donald Trump -- Glenn also says that Trump represents a lot of the reasons why he’s running.
>
> His actions have made that clear. Youngkin spent the Republican primary pushing Donald Trump’s dangerous lie that the 2020 election was stolen. He even said a conspiracy theory about voting machines was the most important issue facing Virginians.
>
> Here’s what I know: Glenn Youngkin might be running for Donald Trump, but Terry is running for _you_.
>
> Terry’s running to make sure the Commonwealth comes back from COVID-19 stronger than ever. He’s running to expand health care and protect reproductive rights. He wants to get weapons of war off our streets while making historic investments in our schools.
>
> Virginia has made incredible progress in recent years. The last thing we need is for Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump to take us back.
>
> That’s why I’m asking you to support Terry. Election experts are calling Virginia one of the most important races in the country.
>
> We must come together, reject Trumpism in our Commonwealth, and send a clear message in support of our positive and progressive future.
>
> [**Please donate any amount that’s meaningful to you right now. Glenn Youngkin has an unlimited warchest to buy the Governor’s office and Terry needs our help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30855690/290834201/-2023814932?refcode=20210615.4_TK_6BI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODg1ZDQxMC0xN2NlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFHiqUvisP0yO4F5FnlnPymZ21GzPQMBf1rPG1ChmKQ=)

> Thank you,
>
> Tim Kaine

Terry’s opponent Glenn Youngkin is a former private equity executive who said he’s willing to spend up to $75 million to buy a place in the Governor’s office. Derek, Youngkin isn’t just endorsed by Donald Trump -- Glenn also says that Trump represents a lot of the reasons why he’s running. His actions have made that clear. Youngkin spent the Republican primary pushing Donald Trump’s dangerous lie that the 2020 election was stolen. He even said a conspiracy theory about voting machines was the most important issue facing Virginians. Here’s what I know: Glenn Youngkin might be running for Donald Trump, but Terry is running for you. Terry’s running to make sure the Commonwealth comes back from COVID-19 stronger than ever. He’s running to expand health care and protect reproductive rights. He wants to get weapons of war off our streets while making historic investments in our schools. Virginia has made incredible progress in recent years. The last thing we need is for Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump to take us back. That’s why I’m asking you to support Terry. Election experts are calling Virginia one of the most important races in the country. We must come together, reject Trumpism in our Commonwealth, and send a clear message in support of our positive and progressive future. = Thank you, Tim Kaine | = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: the GOP just advanced an artisanal voter suppression bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend —
There’s no way to sugarcoat this. The GOP is waging an all-out assault on our democracy.
They’re hosting sham audits of the 2020 election across the country in order to prop up the Big Lie about last year’s election — and they’re trying to make one happen in Pennsylvania, too.
And just today, Pennsylvania Republicans advanced an artisanal voter suppression bill that will discourage working people from participating in our democracy.
This bill is Jim Crow 2.0 — and includes changes to our elections that would add obstacle after obstacle for seniors, parents, students, and workers to make their voices heard.
**I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: We cannot have a government that works for working people if we don’t have a democracy that works for working people.**
As Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator, I’ll fight like hell to ditch the filibuster and pass the For the People Act.
But I need your help to get there. With Joe Manchin obstructing our path, the only way for us to protect our democracy is by flipping this seat.
[Will you pitch in $3 today to help us build a coalition of working people big enough to do that?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30857565/290840719/-347207331?refcode2=c05b9ab3-1cce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210615-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDViOWFiMy0xY2NlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YbGV4a-dyky2QNc5viWi0MDo58Xh8f1Aos-TY3TQlmU=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30857566/290840720/-347207331?refcode2=c05b9ab3-1cce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210615-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDViOWFiMy0xY2NlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YbGV4a-dyky2QNc5viWi0MDo58Xh8f1Aos-TY3TQlmU=)**
I believe our democracy is worth fighting for, and I’m so grateful to have you with me in this fight.
Thank you,
Malcolm
