name: Patricia, me
subject: Six-year-old boy shot
body:
How do these people return to feeling safe and put their lives back together? | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3385f4b97fa645279cf19bfbb260d5e1&_e=H4i3bYXBPhwM1tH2c7o76_4ayDNQ77NbXoA9W2F5LuPNEg_FQU18pOeShaNjO9mOh_32jaU0flDgESLEqVsJwnQdLKADItKhSIa9FIXODm0d72gcfzubZYiGz0GTt6hxgG0iNBFOSgMC4wecvdy5BckyFKPxxQd3476P0P3YxkEtMBnc9h7Ru_yYEX6cyOL4cOPy6pGZpBsYS8q9eFyuUWxyDi4dCpoXUbLHiHonKvXcdQ0kzl0t0PQ5o98UNhKVbSRgHjyAJZx6XWfLAnMKedcyClDtl3WvKsuPaF550iQqRrY5s2-9Ao1WnPmv5DhkWa7Tbsv6sqLbVM2LglWT0MxXjL7VF6ZpZ7yovFPEgiM%3D)
---
Friend,

Violent crime is on the rise and countless new victims are created every single day, and it is happening in our own backyard.

* _In Orange County, California, a six-year-old boy was killed while his mother was driving him to school when an angry driver shot a gun through the back of their car on the freeway._

* _In Phoenix, a woman was sexually assaulted by two men after meeting one of them on a dating app. One of the men had a handgun in his pocket when police found and arrested him._

* _In Louisiana, a Texas man who was visiting to see his daughter graduate from high school was gunned down for no reason at all while opening the car door for his girlfriend. He is in critical condition and his shooter has not yet been identified._

* _Nationwide, murder rates were up 25% in 2020, with over 20,000 victims._

But while we justifiably focus on how to solve the problem and punish those responsible, **we often forget about the victims and their families.**

_How do the parents of the murdered six-year-old move on?_

_How does the sexual assault victim learn to trust again?_

_How do these people return to feeling safe and put their lives back together?_

At **Crime Survivors, Inc.** , we are focused on these people. They’re our neighbors, coworkers, friends, family - or maybe even you.

We are a **501c3, tax-exempt charitable organization** whose mission is to help these people transition from being victims to becoming survivors who can thrive and have hope and peace once again.

These victims need our help - [**and we need your help to help them. Your donation to Crime Survivors is 100% tax deductible**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3385f4b97fa645279cf19bfbb260d5e1&_e=H4i3bYXBPhwM1tH2c7o76_4ayDNQ77NbXoA9W2F5LuPNEg_FQU18pOeShaNjO9mOh_32jaU0flDgESLEqVsJwnQdLKADItKhSIa9FIXODm0d72gcfzubZYiGz0GTt6hxUFp4yIU-6PoLJOHim8Rz0rg3Gcaz9RLZ8Yza1aeKxW0MktXzPRqV_rOCvNCDOwLAXv_8-mpBLQUksBIGGlTvGxYxCQT4c4QUo-a15rUHBL7K2l-5tY85rOjX-Cxt2gNhZgKM5sSW_aXX-14Vpo6cXTuaCEBtbOKAPKsEwRgk3AtHCw9yklfRRAN6j3UJzsl2I0XIjtAP5w_94ysWgSjvouE921FbkUAvKyNMUXZ8QSM%3D) and helps us provide survivors with c**ounseling, legal services, housing, food, employment, protection, and more** - and we do it all out of our brick-and-mortar Resource Center in Orange County, California, _which we also need to keep staffed and running._

[**SUPPORT CRIME SURVIVORS’ WORK**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3385f4b97fa645279cf19bfbb260d5e1&_e=H4i3bYXBPhwM1tH2c7o76_4ayDNQ77NbXoA9W2F5LuPNEg_FQU18pOeShaNjO9mOh_32jaU0flDgESLEqVsJwnQdLKADItKhSIa9FIXODm0d72gcfzubZYiGz0GTt6hxSvYJW7JzrtmBEJ-HxlH_nG9Y_X0Oyg2wBcSQAduKa8aeWbyPeY9CDz-fUnvXu55M3ZyJqlbaYJtA0fbL_5FeRCgkeIoNfxJnNSba7pK7O2xY5Sj5wxO05-fgIJupXVCnmsbe5b4WxNQte9Z4Jf_dH48yNIoCcTywGcjHDiGrOAU8JGhO7DZ6MHEY7rju3PdxhlLvFKNScj3woQ2HuZ_03TB1yYpVBu1pWwl1skeiRtI%3D)
With soft-on-crime policies becoming more prevalent in our country, it is inevitable that this will only create more victims who need our critical and even _**life-saving**_ support and services.

I don’t use the term **“life-saving”** lightly, friend - [**with support from generous donors like you over the past 18 years**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3385f4b97fa645279cf19bfbb260d5e1&_e=H4i3bYXBPhwM1tH2c7o76_4ayDNQ77NbXoA9W2F5LuPNEg_FQU18pOeShaNjO9mOh_32jaU0flDgESLEqVsJwnQdLKADItKhSIa9FIXODm0d72gcfzubZYiGz0GTt6hxRzPv85O2KSoVljcsm8hM32G_w4baq1tDx7gGhHgF0OkWdyRUScdaRKR2JY7K0OfYrvgialcY4_6FoIOl2bO64Pg85EUUlcbq7gOwXxfK9roHEV1biSqzN0LDehOO0Huy4t4NC44fcWpxPOb_WL5AvJ4508E-rCdyHaJpR3in1SHXiKuaP5NShowtBT77miE7sWs26HhDm4ZVdU-tFduN6SMzFbJgAAOKN29HY5nO8jM%3D), we have helped thousands of survivors and saved hundreds of them from situations in which their lives were either in danger or they could have taken their own.

Here’s what one survivor has had to say about our work with them:

> _“After years of domestic violence and coerced control I finally left the situation only to find that it takes new formats. With my new freedom, my situation has drastically improved, and I am learning to be stronger, to have a voice, and to hold my own step by step. In those darkest and scariest first couple years Crime Survivors has given our family support and joy and hope. By caring about our plight when most didn’t understand or really know how to empathize Crime Survivors showed us love. I am grateful, and hopeful for our future!”_
[**SUPPORT CRIME SURVIVORS’ WORK**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3385f4b97fa645279cf19bfbb260d5e1&_e=H4i3bYXBPhwM1tH2c7o76_4ayDNQ77NbXoA9W2F5LuPNEg_FQU18pOeShaNjO9mOh_32jaU0flDgESLEqVsJwnQdLKADItKhSIa9FIXODm0d72gcfzubZYiGz0GTt6hxwcJdBDWI56IGnpKrT31x0EyKay8prC-yX6XK7M_sznZY04nNxSp4KkKGfzZaXqinTgL3LVtPNQbei2nTSa2CuwKRfgM1LId4o14Qy1m7_rjiHEUJkMBYLeizsmuggMcwN5GXLsUnSZhqrBdGRiafrIwfb8l3FUprNE9hdQJd-E3SvPWmuACwSOfqYpeKWEUYL2sXFbK_SRZAuTduFM0Fn0s1dkcPEfXM4BWsqe999gc%3D)
This is just one of thousands, and sadly we know there are countless victims out there who we’ve yet to come in contact with and help. **But with your support, we can.**

[**Will you help Crime Survivors provide victims of violent crime abuse with the help, hope and healing they need by making a 100% tax-deductible donation of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or another amount today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3385f4b97fa645279cf19bfbb260d5e1&_e=H4i3bYXBPhwM1tH2c7o76_4ayDNQ77NbXoA9W2F5LuPNEg_FQU18pOeShaNjO9mOh_32jaU0flDgESLEqVsJwnQdLKADItKhSIa9FIXODm0d72gcfzubZYiGz0GTt6hxAEovTb6-BxFSHpt98jOLU7YzJ5yIed-8ezCuyIjajgsezl8lKJ59tQTp8yTwaT_tXzLwgxqdheVr4Bdm6JFxh_w37opdjkt-Bt_FcNXW5U83gelCSGwkjTrI7Bwy-IFnc974L7pDPL-7gzlnS22KwyyjZmaTEE1vmQWRMg2Oz1NFXe32gn9H1kLW68Dw__msjS4NhpPxmwnKwAzORiO-gAKxuP66Kk-cD2IVfQdybZw%3D)

Thank you for helping us change and even save lives!

With Faith, there is Hope.

Patricia Wenskunas, Founder/CEO
Crime Survivors, Inc.

[**SUPPORT CRIME SURVIVORS’ WORK**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3385f4b97fa645279cf19bfbb260d5e1&_e=H4i3bYXBPhwM1tH2c7o76_4ayDNQ77NbXoA9W2F5LuPNEg_FQU18pOeShaNjO9mOh_32jaU0flDgESLEqVsJwnQdLKADItKhSIa9FIXODm0d72gcfzubZYiGz0GTt6hxDsyjOUx0wcY3XvVwxBspCeO-KwVSXs2RVFqEoWOjCC3-6K-QwIK1LjdLL-bax42qMRjR7eljsCnZI43aIohoPy3yfELUOH4023_fsFskESe_vmbNUclGDGGYPhikCKbOocWjJb9AHDgdhUsLqlhg1dVhJe6FHWdbFHhm3Vmjw9vvChfJsE7z_KQ845M-4GRabRkVPgLaPH1yJm9BSuikB83KvIoQ4l31t2NcuWka3_g%3D)

| | _Based in Southern California, Crime Survivors, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) tax exempt non-profit organization working to enhance public awareness of victims' rights and needs and to provide resources, support and information to empower crime victims to survive and thrive.**[To support Crime Survivors, please make a donation of $5 or more today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3385f4b97fa645279cf19bfbb260d5e1&_e=H4i3bYXBPhwM1tH2c7o76_4ayDNQ77NbXoA9W2F5LuPNEg_FQU18pOeShaNjO9mOh_32jaU0flDgESLEqVsJwnQdLKADItKhSIa9FIXODm0d72gcfzubZYiGz0GTt6hxXgMPgFX15ciFLC8GVWL2N14Fu6lIDV5QcvCJp_pcVvuCdmISFZBoff4aETFzM78yJjxBOXegP_9MJec8avdiWgPTfCs7zaBogLkLg3YL_rh8lfV5j0MFOoblu6NHtzfgdmaibmcBd2lyr9tE6tJxKZumWzYlpo6IrhpL8PnztfTF3WBSyO2Kvw--8M-dqXsXIwu7CqFNYNrPjpT6PSYLUxphQWL_UfybhubYMYdXtOk%3D)**_

www.CrimeSurvivors.org
---

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: Californians need relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
We need everyone on board to help reach our June goal for a California Comeback! Read more >>
Peter, Gavin Newsom has failed Californians again and again — _it’s no mystery why he is up for a recall election before the end of the year_. **While Californians have been looking to Sacramento for solutions, Newsom and the rest of the radical left’s answer has been to increase taxes on families and small businesses. ** That is NO way to reverse the steady flow of hardworking Americans leaving the Golden state for other places where they can make a life and raise their families. I have a real plan for the LARGEST MIDDLE CLASS TAX CUT in California history, but I need your help if we’re going to recall Gavin Newsom first. **We are up against the clock to meet our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tonight** , and I am asking everyone to chip in what they can to help us reach it. **[Please RUSH a grassroots donation of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can right now to RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6b6760d6f7d28263/0f495d00ed7c1789c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** Californians need relief. They’ve had enough of the one-party rule that has forced so many of their neighbors out of state. Help me turn things around by [**chipping in to my campaign**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6b6760d6f7d28263/8355a687b17a0710c3d6b838967d376c/34943) before MIDNIGHT. Thanks for your help,
Kevin Faulconer | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6b6760d6f7d28263/7197c861e195784dc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6b6760d6f7d28263/cd010e0f858ea47dc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6b6760d6f7d28263/d188583d59017a10c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6b6760d6f7d28263/52df7f336cafdd74c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

We are up against the clock to meet our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tonight , and I am asking everyone to chip in what they can to help us reach it. Californians need relief. They’ve had enough of the one-party rule that has forced so many of their neighbors out of state. Help me turn things around by before MIDNIGHT. Thanks for your help, Kevin Faulconer | | | | | ---|---|---|--- id:2021-06-10-16:01:05:155t Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Republican Party leadership has pledged to gerrymander Chris Pappas out of his seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

When my friend, Congressman Chris Pappas, was elected in 2018, he became the first openly gay person to ever represent New Hampshire in Congress. As our president would say, that's a pretty big deal.

Since then, Chris has worked tirelessly to serve New Hampshire -- and the rest of our country. And it's clear he's delivered results: in 2020, he was the first Democrat to win re-election to New Hampshire's First Congressional District in more than a decade.

Chris has been a champion for working people since day one, but national Republicans and Republican party leaders in his home state are doing everything they can to defeat him next year. Of the five seats they need to flip to take back the House majority, Chris's seat is at the **top.**

**And to make a tough situation worse,_the New Hampshire Republican Party chair pledged to gerrymander Chris Pappas out of his seat next year._**

**[Chris needs our help to win re-election, Peter. Will you split a contribution between his campaign and ours to keep the House blue?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZBKeW1HSuqKinlLYQ1JuxHqEg-3LyKFgt5KcIHDBQ98=/qnyn3WW3Z0-xPJIvDM6DBoET9sghIqf5qcTuHljzemQ=?gpsid=50_115_19408&refcode=em21_210615_Pappas_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210615_Pappas_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

I've been proud to work alongside Chris these past few years to protect our environment, expand access to quality and affordable health care, and make our elections more free and fair. Chris is always willing to reach across the aisle to deliver results, and in a way that does not compromise on his progressive values and principles.

From improving drinking water standards to introducing the Equality Act and everything in between, Chris Pappas has shown time and time again that he is a true public servant.

**[Will you join me in supporting Chris Pappas today? Split a contribution of whatever you can between his campaign and ours. Together we can protect our Democratic House majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZBKeW1HSuqKinlLYQ1JuxHqEg-3LyKFgt5KcIHDBQ98=/qnyn3WW3Z0-xPJIvDM6DBoET9sghIqf5qcTuHljzemQ=?gpsid=50_115_19408&refcode=em21_210615_Pappas_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210615_Pappas_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZBKeW1HSuqKinlLYQ1JuxHqEg-3LyKFgt5KcIHDBQ98=/qnyn3WW3Z0-xPJIvDM6DBoET9sghIqf5qcTuHljzemQ=?gpsid=50_115_19408&refcode=em21_210615_Pappas_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210615_Pappas_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
---

---

Tacoma WA 98402 United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: Peter, it would be my *honor* to do this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here are just some of the big things I'd be a guaranteed YES on if elected to the U.S. Senate:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210615-1761-header&t=1&akid=1761%2E434096%2ES2Np-L)
There's something important you should know about me + our race to flip this Senate seat blue in 2022.
| **John Fetterman** @johnfetterman
---|---
| | | I would always be that 51st vote. That’s the tweet.
---
Here's what I mean, Peter: Right now, Democrats have a razor-thin majority. If elected to the Senate, I will *always* be the deciding vote that Democrats can count on to get bold, common-sense legislation passed so that we can actually deliver on our promises to working people.
**Here are just some of the big things I'd be a guaranteed YES on if elected to the U.S. Senate:**
✊ Protecting the union way of life by passing the PRO Act
💵 Raising the national minimum wage to at least $15 an hour
🥦 Legalizing weed nationally + expunging all marijuana records + releasing all those incarcerated for using the plant
🌈 Expanding LGBTQIA+ rights and freedoms through the Equality Act
🏛 Defending reproductive rights enshrined under _Roe v. Wade_
❌ Abolishing the Jim Crow filibuster
🗳 Passing the For the People Act
✔️ And SO much more. That was the floor — not the ceiling.
If that sounds like a senator that you'd get on board with, I'm asking you to do something important for our campaign ahead of tonight's mid-month deadline: [**Will you chip in your first-ever $5 to our campaign to help flip this seat? Winning PA in 2022 is the crucial first step towards getting alllll of those important priorities passed.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20260?refcode=em20210615-1761&t=2&akid=1761%2E434096%2ES2Np-L)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20260?refcode=em20210615-1761&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1761%2E434096%2ES2Np-L)**
Peter, no voter owes their allegiance to any one political party. And I think that it's past time for Democrats in Congress to walk the walk when it comes to getting things done.
**We should be out there earning those votes by delivering meaningful progress every day.** I'm talking about real, tangible ways of making life better for working folks. That's the entire reason I got into public service nearly two decades ago as Mayor of Braddock, and it's why I'm running today to flip this Senate seat.
[**So, if you can, will you donate your first $5 to our campaign if you're on board with our fight to flip this seat and save our democracy? Tonight marks halfway through the final month before our giant Q2 deadline, so anything helps!**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20260?refcode=em20210615-1761&t=22&akid=1761%2E434096%2ES2Np-L)
Yinz are the best. Truly. More from me soon, but in the meantime, thank you SO much for the support.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. I've said this before, but I'll keep saying it louder for our pals in the back: _I think Democrats should vote like Democrats._ Especially in this 50-50 Senate. It would be my *honor* to be that deciding vote in the Senate for our bold, common-sense priorities, Peter, but I need your help to get there. [**Can you throw a few bucks our way before midnight? Thanks in advance.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20260?refcode=em20210615-1761&t=23&akid=1761%2E434096%2ES2Np-L)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210615-1761-footer&t=24&refcode2=1761_434096_S2Np-L&akid=1761%2E434096%2ES2Np-L)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=1761%2E434096%2ES2Np-L)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1761%2E434096%2ES2Np-L)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: PragerU
subject: BREAKING: Video service refuses to host our videos!
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c97c21d54b1845c6a26a9b8b4e6e0ee9&_e=W7gs8t1wk5zsyYQ8rFVC85q3U_NTRDY9X7ekJ_JxojFFcl-8Y4PWJQnId6gIZ5GtuxBGYNHXBgAy3gAzp5JAOqj0uccE842Mpx3Nvr9l_r4UbBLLtopXUGp4aLKMsnh-4o_I7i6X8aUCcn0U58fyMHEVenCjl0JKfLPBnv00s6Z005peZddmKudcFsLE2B0DIbLQcfv5VjV-vNLEc6MSfEG2PM54YnplON_xjrz-pEXysrJHWunQR1SL1HXBwsrIc4WWQ0WcDLfx8IyDtZD--hWnIAUN1ErwUNlxShFac-IoHZi-KOyXFhogF6emwb8fbwYL1TyuZxLUYhsqPwc0vw%3D%3D) [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c97c21d54b1845c6a26a9b8b4e6e0ee9&_e=W7gs8t1wk5zsyYQ8rFVC85q3U_NTRDY9X7ekJ_JxojFFcl-8Y4PWJQnId6gIZ5GtuxBGYNHXBgAy3gAzp5JAOqj0uccE842Mpx3Nvr9l_r4UbBLLtopXUGp4aLKMsnh-NZu8mnoBMMf2M_t4z-ebdjZMyvXdS4dDMOlGi6AiKhwnQJNu1fntbL0znmw3Ehb_IZiqxL5hH7o2z_y0SDT9jrtO8eJXSzzJXdWo9KCcCO4dJOscCP39dyKWRrOT2WLrt14gxgZoMBThr769T9TgJ1mbtIraZKabV0093I8WyHW4y345kubtWyxZ9lK_a21vkoJO-yfbWnxxA3OqF6f1aw%3D%3D) Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds. When YouTube began restricting 200+ “dangerous” PragerU videos a few years ago—including our series on The Ten Commandments—we took matters into our own hands and our viewership quadrupled! **Thanks to supporters like you, PragerU had the funding to innovate and build our own streaming infrastructure.** Instead of embedding (often restricted) videos from YouTube on our website, mobile app, and streaming TV channels, we hosted them natively using a video player software company called JW Player. Every time we’ve hit a wall, we’ve been able to find a way around it. But now, we are facing a serious new threat. Just as our contract was coming up for renewal, JW Player informed us they had updated their “community guidelines.” They announced they won’t be renewing our contract as they claim that “PragerU’s content is misleading.” PragerU pressed for more information. Which videos did they feel were misleading? What kind of methods were they using to fact-check information? Is this decision final? In their words: “...the primary basis for our decision was related to the prohibition of misleading content...based on the nature of the violations, I don’t see a viable path forward...” **[Give Today to Help PragerU Gain Independence from Big Tech!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c97c21d54b1845c6a26a9b8b4e6e0ee9&_e=W7gs8t1wk5zsyYQ8rFVC85q3U_NTRDY9X7ekJ_JxojFFcl-8Y4PWJQnId6gIZ5GtuxBGYNHXBgAy3gAzp5JAOqj0uccE842Mpx3Nvr9l_r4UbBLLtopXUGp4aLKMsnh-K2BOtEczl9iN387jp8Y5eGYok-xE1G1BMP9j4d0bL-VqxkqAzQe6uXI_wxCpACh_pKTr7RMCVZA2EDM47BjAfKZvKkkf-c0HIy4L9uulOS0QTp-HCVb_UoOrsCmFH_LGengs9z8ORNzsM5aFymcO81QDL6BkSYzbZFJuGGKFtD5Zx4tVQNh-0DVM7HnBzcwmqev-Ijtyh-e91L3irml1Fw%3D%3D)** In cowardly fashion, they refused to give specifics and hid behind third party “fact-checkers” to purge PragerU as a client. Meanwhile, JW Player’s current clients include left-wing media outlets like The Young Turks and Vice! These companies produce thousands of videos using politically-charged narratives that divide our country and teach young folks to resent America. [**Now, even PragerU’s own platforms are under attack.** We call on you again, our wonderful supporters, to stand by us! ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c97c21d54b1845c6a26a9b8b4e6e0ee9&_e=W7gs8t1wk5zsyYQ8rFVC85q3U_NTRDY9X7ekJ_JxojFFcl-8Y4PWJQnId6gIZ5GtuxBGYNHXBgAy3gAzp5JAOqj0uccE842Mpx3Nvr9l_r4UbBLLtopXUGp4aLKMsnh-9r08CL2e7MTXKiMLj3iXtYAeyj40y0dO86Ex9W6S6aj_eYMlU7LruVZ3aA0wOO5YzretrzGwDabKSyygrF1RdGOQyW_TsItcmfXB3pjJKCQPJiy5u2LMCZRpXkZOMwevwFnf2g4yOTxrfsCQIcVnuwnX1nf1dnq199VjaW2ul1WtL-7m18a7pRg1bQ0dtMXdvWDY2-ZRt8SvHYhnAp5qCA%3D%3D) What’s at stake is Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. Without these freedoms, the America we love will not exist for our children and grandchildren. [Donate Now](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c97c21d54b1845c6a26a9b8b4e6e0ee9&_e=W7gs8t1wk5zsyYQ8rFVC85q3U_NTRDY9X7ekJ_JxojFFcl-8Y4PWJQnId6gIZ5GtuxBGYNHXBgAy3gAzp5JAOqj0uccE842Mpx3Nvr9l_r4UbBLLtopXUGp4aLKMsnh-8_WZUBqnd2hhDxcOzZCYZklSQTJwWcOITtBvRNJvfxSCTB4TOY1IiIgK9fUM9wuQ8_N2a_RZEGVy26EFgR9BzmUp6L36bqEpeAqxdECW1RGoz1JxYN0uHW32aQVYjX5o7d9JeTzfve4p4N_QQ0sF9C_JRGrmIQFUNqoxRo7bh89QsFEqrRdxoHhNqhYDp7ksV4QUITsj9zXGmeFVDSAagA%3D%3D) **Rest assured, we’re already working on a solution to keep our videos online. Now we need your support TODAY to WAKE AMERICA UP to the dangers of online censorship while we develop alternative technologies—for greater independence from Big Tech Tyranny.** **[Please give today to keep our videos reaching and changing millions of young minds! ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c97c21d54b1845c6a26a9b8b4e6e0ee9&_e=W7gs8t1wk5zsyYQ8rFVC85q3U_NTRDY9X7ekJ_JxojFFcl-8Y4PWJQnId6gIZ5GtuxBGYNHXBgAy3gAzp5JAOqj0uccE842Mpx3Nvr9l_r4UbBLLtopXUGp4aLKMsnh-S4tg1zBZ8j6S8078iyiwUy0PkPnlYwRuGkAv7Kdy-22UwTY941lP1HSn3UrWp78Xy-Vf3-mzMbXIMlwlbsA1fn2CSeCEVcGC2NeeFH_g10_H78yIOrj2ItneTuXBl6BRhmF0hxSWLypNA2LxZ3BIBLh5Krsqu8pqax9WEUZeokzSr7OZoYKRCWM1l-sOYKxdmHg6TBUc0pQFvzqhj3lSqw%3D%3D)** We cannot do this alone, Your PragerU Team | |
---

clean_body: Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds. When YouTube began restricting 200+ “dangerous” PragerU videos a few years ago—including our series on The Ten Commandments—we took matters into our own hands and our viewership quadrupled! Thanks to supporters like you, PragerU had the funding to innovate and build our own streaming infrastructure. Instead of embedding (often restricted) videos from YouTube on our website, mobile app, and streaming TV channels, we hosted them natively using a video player software company called JW Player. Every time we’ve hit a wall, we’ve been able to find a way around it. But now, we are facing a serious new threat. Just as our contract was coming up for renewal, JW Player informed us they had updated their “community guidelines.” They announced they won’t be renewing our contract as they claim that “PragerU’s content is misleading.” PragerU pressed for more information. Which videos did they feel were misleading? What kind of methods were they using to fact-check information? Is this decision final? In their words: “...the primary basis for our decision was related to the prohibition of misleading content...based on the nature of the violations, I don’t see a viable path forward...” In cowardly fashion, they refused to give specifics and hid behind third party “fact-checkers” to purge PragerU as a client. Meanwhile, JW Player’s current clients include left-wing media outlets like The Young Turks and Vice! These companies produce thousands of videos using politically-charged narratives that divide our country and teach young folks to resent America. What’s at stake is Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. Without these freedoms, the America we love will not exist for our children and grandchildren. Rest assured, we’re already working on a solution to keep our videos online. Now we need your support TODAY to WAKE AMERICA UP to the dangers of online censorship while we develop alternative technologies—for greater independence from Big Tech Tyranny. We cannot do this alone, Your PragerU Team | | Help us fight back against Big Tech censorship. Donate today. Copyright © 2021 PragerU, All rights reserved.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Fighting back against disinformation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
A super PAC is spending tens of thousands of dollars right now to spread disinformation and lies about Alexandria.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210615-2217-header&t=1&akid=2217%2E2526796%2EoPwVXh)
This just broke:
**A super PAC is spending tens of thousands of dollars right now on an attack campaign against Alexandria.**
This just goes to show that special interests are gearing up now for the 2022 midterm elections — and it’s critical that we have the resources to fight back against the lies and disinformation that these attack campaigns historically spread.
Keeping our campaign strong with grassroots support is the number one way we can communicate the truth about Alexandria, our policies, and what our movement is fighting for.
[Before our important end-of-quarter deadline, can you please make a $3 contribution today to help fight back against disinformation and keep AOC in Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210615?refcode=em20210615-2217-P&t=20&refcode2=2217_2526796_oPwVXh&akid=2217%2E2526796%2EoPwVXh)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210615?refcode=em20210615-2217-P&t=21&refcode2=2217_2526796_oPwVXh&akid=2217%2E2526796%2EoPwVXh)**
**Alexandria is one of the most heavily targeted Democrats in Congress.** Right-wing outlets like Fox News spend countless hours trying to stoke outrage about her policy agenda, and special interests pour big money into spreading disinformation about her to voters.
While they stay busy attacking Alexandria, she’s always going to remain focused on speaking truth to power and fighting for a better world for working families.
But she can’t do this work alone. She needs a strong grassroots movement alongside her. And we rely on small-dollar donations from emails just like this one to fight back against this harmful disinformation and keep Alexandria fighting in Congress.
[If you’re able to, please make a contribution of $3 or anything you can today to make sure we’re prepared to fight back against these attacks.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210615?refcode=em20210615-2217-P&t=22&refcode2=2217_2526796_oPwVXh&akid=2217%2E2526796%2EoPwVXh)
Thank you for being on our team,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210615?refcode=em20210615-2217-P&t=23&refcode2=2217_2526796_oPwVXh&akid=2217%2E2526796%2EoPwVXh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=2217%2E2526796%2EoPwVXh) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=2217%2E2526796%2EoPwVXh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=2217%2E2526796%2EoPwVXh)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Two weeks to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
please read today | | |
---
Team -- In just TWO WEEKS, we close the books on the quarter. Our fundraising numbers will be public, and potential opponents and shady outside groups will get a snapshot of our campaign’s strength. Republicans will use our report to make decisions about how to unseat Senator Hassan and flip the Senate. And since she only won by 1,017 votes in 2016 and current polls show her behind, weak fundraising would invite massive, misleading attacks that could cost us this seat. New Hampshire is a swing state that’ll almost certainly decide Senate control, so hitting our $15,000 mid-month benchmark TODAY is really important. **[If just 1 out of 3 people reading this email gave $5 right now, we’d knock our goal out of the park. You’re a top supporter, Friend, and the Senator needs your help. clean_body: | | You know when somebody says something idiotic, and then doubles down: | "GOP Sen. Ron Johnson said the Capitol riot wasn’t an armed insurrection because people were 'staying within the roped lines'" = That’s what Ron Johnson has been doing since he was elected to the U.S. Senate. As we approach the most critical end-of-month FEC deadline of this election, we need your help to raise the funds necessary to run a campaign that continues to hold Ron Johnson accountable. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = People are already counting us out in this election. Remember, they’re already writing the obituary for this campaign: “Tom Nelson is clever and hard-working, but he’s not shown the ability to raise money, or much money in the past” We’re proud that this campaign is not self-funding or relying on Wall Street, and we have more fight in us than people are giving us credit for. But, we need to hit every financial deadline possible, which includes staying on pace ahead of the FEC deadline at the end of this month. = | = Thanks for your support, Nelson HQ | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

clean_body: We have to Save America. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I need your help. Right now in Congress, the Democrats are plotting to undermine our constitution and rig our elections by ending Voter ID, legalizing ballot harvesting, and stuffing Democrat campaigns full of taxpayer money. You’ve probably heard about this scheme already: they call it “H.R. 1,” but I call it the “Corrupt Politicians Act” (because that’s the only people it helps). | | | | | | Listen, Peter: Democrats are determined to pass this bill and undermine our elections. | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Team Mondaire

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

**Tomorrow, June 16th,** Mondaire is joining Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Congressman Jamaal Bowman, and New York Attorney General Letitia James for a virtual town hall on the _For the People Act._
**[You won’t want to miss this — so check out the details below, and click here to RSVP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30860846/290851525/1403014753?utm_source=mondaire&refcode=em210615-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODMxMWVjZS0yN2NlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGiyUvwo-Mu9q-8mOKlchH4-avbEb09DWHd7HR2jFRY=&emci=bc00b184-21ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=78311ece-27ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)**
**Virtual Town Hall on the _For the People Act_**
Wednesday, June 16
7:30 - 8:30 PM ET
**[RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30860847/290851526/1403014753?utm_source=mondaire&refcode=em210615-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODMxMWVjZS0yN2NlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGiyUvwo-Mu9q-8mOKlchH4-avbEb09DWHd7HR2jFRY=&emci=bc00b184-21ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=78311ece-27ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)**
The _For the People Act_ is landmark voting legislation which, if passed, will strengthen our democracy by limiting voter suppression and partisan gerrymandering, enacting automatic voter registration, and paving the way for a robust public financing system for federal campaigns. But Senate Republicans are using the filibuster to prevent its passage.
Mondaire’s fighting against voter suppression to build a better democracy for all, and we know it would mean a lot to him if you would join this special event to learn more about the _For the People Act_ and the other work he’s doing in Congress to protect the right to vote.
**[Are you in? Click here to RSVP for Mondaire’s town hall with Chuck Schumer, Jamaal Bowman, and Letitia James tomorrow, June 16 at 7:30 PM ET.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30860848/290851527/1403014753?utm_source=mondaire&refcode=em210615-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODMxMWVjZS0yN2NlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGiyUvwo-Mu9q-8mOKlchH4-avbEb09DWHd7HR2jFRY=&emci=bc00b184-21ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=78311ece-27ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)**
Thanks for reading, and we hope to see you soon!
All our best,
Team Mondaire

name: Susan Wild
subject: asking before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Republicans are already going full steam ahead to try to take this seat in 2022 -- so we need to start fighting back now.

| Peter,

This is the last time I’ll ask before our mid-month deadline. [_**To stay on track for our mid-month goal we need to raise just $584 by midnight, and I would really appreciate anything you can spare to help us get there.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30861093/290852378/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210615-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmIzODVmMS0yOGNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jkFQ-hy3Cu97ZL0tZozidX2Ui1gDxDmqDEWZNCe5nXs=)

Trust me, I know Election Day seems far away. And while I would much rather be completely focused on my legislative work, **Republicans are already going full steam ahead to try to take this seat in 2022 -- so we need to start fighting back now.**

Last quarter, one of our Republican opponents outraised us (thanks to her self-funding.) We can’t afford to fall short again this time.

[_**Can you donate to help us reach our goal before midnight? Anything you can chip in right now would mean a lot to me and my team.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30861094/290852379/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210615-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmIzODVmMS0yOGNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jkFQ-hy3Cu97ZL0tZozidX2Ui1gDxDmqDEWZNCe5nXs=)

Thank you,
Susan Wild

name: Laura Loomer
subject: WATCH: Politician BUSTED Lying for Zuckerbucks
body:
Around the country, bother Republican and Democrat politicians and supervisors of elections officials were gladly taking money from . . .
| | | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2RW9OfoC82Cv28TotOB7Og/oAqq8z4hRmEWjfTkf4mr0w) | Patriot,

Around the country, both Republican and Democrat politicians and supervisors of elections officials were gladly taking money from the $400 million pot offered by Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg to fund mail-in voting just before the 2020 Election.

When my own county was caught taking this dirty money, I had to look into it, but I was stonewalled, ignored, and my questions went unanswered.

So, I confronted the Palm Beach County Supervisor of Elections, Wendy Sartory Link. [**Watch here:**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2RW9OfoC82Cv28TotOB7Og/oAqq8z4hRmEWjfTkf4mr0w)
[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2RW9OfoC82Cv28TotOB7Og/oAqq8z4hRmEWjfTkf4mr0w)
The story doesn't end here, so stay tuned and [**support my work**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2RW9OfoC82Cv28TotOB7Og/oAqq8z4hRmEWjfTkf4mr0w) after you watch and share.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Team Kasich
subject: The Latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Read Gov. Kasich's latest columns in the Wall Street Journal and The Hill. Also learn how our work together is making a difference! [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9b64444439b14252b623a76f663b75f8&_e=QH35nN6weWzTRRBrfnOpXBCnwHJJB7XFdpnFEL8pfHSdknV-jR9Ce6wcfWRsne8bx1NvmK0Id9AucjLENvypZHNmlmogsIRrvQBT5v_Jgy_8fIP14gvJvGbx6dhN_jC-zjGW8Qvl7DYN98kzPuzNuoAeYqLCdONX3TA2dK1Fd1p3gixcHi7jtEELJIyLqxSQ_UoxECC9KDf5gaJ6yVF0qpUnwpcHsTDmRQTiVILphI_lFqH7FfVF2DFJV8zNzPcTHTcjuJWcH6bqdtMksbdBWw%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter, in our most recent message to you, we highlighted the courage of the 35 U.S. House Republicans who voted in favor of the bipartisan commission to investigate the Jan. 6th attach on the U.S. Capitol.

While it was ultimately derailed in the Senate, it was a sign of growing momentum as more Republicans speak out about what's best for our nation, not just a political party. **What we are doing together is making a difference!**

Last week, we saw another example of courage from West Virginia's Democrat Senator Joe Manchin who stood up to his party on eliminating the filibuster. Gov. Kasich said in his [Wall Street Journal column (subscription)](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9b64444439b14252b623a76f663b75f8&_e=QH35nN6weWzTRRBrfnOpXLV4V0CWmuy3hyNODrsO04jhv-Ow23lgv5bMtk4CTKXz5cYGtUx3fNdluOHDYzLuYDmwpFxLH96uM_5JQrIf3kCekcKA_SPi6NsCPgRD3FSu_-Bg32ahJ5hKV86LDRoab-F2PIWGiW09DshBsYrgDKyIxwgRlVv_5JbMLsGEPdASBWVS7i4E94BCUYdfheVEAEKgqL8R-K0ceqQ3RGFTuFysQYPUaRdwy9rdFuvkpUYD4xwb28_OZIAcJgno8ZFbHvT3URvtdIjJsgtb4OLkmsxHziUSSMeLLXdW4WH616SukUoUQQuaJfE9mQVggtg7Fw%3D%3D):

_"What rankled me then, and frustrates me as I watch what’s happening to Mr. Manchin, is that critics always ask the wrong question. Instead of asking, “Why won’t those troublemakers just do as they’re told?” why not think of it this way: “If they’re willing to take this much heat, do they see something I don’t?”_

_Courage is valued not because it’s common or easy—just the opposite. It brings risks to prosperity, reputation and even life and limb. No one wants to be in that position. Everyone would rather be loved. Therefore, when someone is willing to risk stakes that high, shouldn’t it make us pause for a moment? Taking it a step further, when someone takes a path that potentially comes with high costs, and we only respond with criticism, are we missing something amazing unfolding right before us that we say we value—courage?"_
[](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9b64444439b14252b623a76f663b75f8&_e=QH35nN6weWzTRRBrfnOpXLV4V0CWmuy3hyNODrsO04jhv-Ow23lgv5bMtk4CTKXz5cYGtUx3fNdluOHDYzLuYDmwpFxLH96uM_5JQrIf3kArxiLDxfjVgLE-mHuORJ50zC9QwzFV8sEeOUP9q5MDDr-XSe7kicE_YF5CnaZkOPezirM4GfQ4xo3kpctG7QufLlmI9GwESiHIiZwsUDYnEM9yxyTcP0HO922aWR_9r8xxdPKLjb_vxgkqVi5OqdLVmnN-WC9cd5HRMRt86cIxu_2Mj6IcI2Yu7cqwjy34CHxqdeqYlvTEXQjzLvT5SVTXpR75-r69jsgQYDCO0jhcfw%3D%3D)
|
---
This will continue to grow and in some part, it's thanks to the work we have been doing to push back on the nonsense and instead, embrace truth and integrity. But we still have a long way to go to heal our nation's politics and refocus the GOP on offering Americans policy ideas and a hopeful vision for the future.

Peter, Gov. Kasich needs your help to keep up the fight. The money we raise goes directly into our advocacy work, helping us rally more supporters to fight for our country. Anything you'd be willing to contribute to that effort is most appreciated.
[DONATE TODAY](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9b64444439b14252b623a76f663b75f8&_e=QH35nN6weWzTRRBrfnOpXLwCKXdjdhfnU05uhPETlVPYaAgUjDfCjJXbSNVDViJCAnbn5r6M9d7ISYEj_xae2dashsFzQzrbHtp-MyItJg5JMvPraBuEHKPqjjukXf-dmVCzbKNGqrxEjmTT8Tv3cXlL-CfGCnh3GntK6qy41VR_OiX5rbU_ySuGNXEnmH_SSBuHRIEYvK18Lj-kaTHPwVWBiA-pAawxFicg8sSVpU8bWVRvgYiScCTVwL_XVhAjTaXrHNghEe-llAk-SYryPw%3D%3D)
|
---
Gov. Kasich was also a guest recently on HBO's 'Real Timers' with Bill Maher. He was joined by former MSNBC 'Hardball' host Chris Matthews as they discussed the state of America's politics and how both parties stand to gain from bipartisan work on our largest challenges. clean_body: Read Gov. Kasich's latest columns in the Wall Street Journal and The Hill. Also learn how our work together is making a difference! | | Peter, in our most recent message to you, we highlighted the courage of the 35 U.S. House Republicans who voted in favor of the bipartisan commission to investigate the Jan. 6th attach on the U.S. Capitol. While it was ultimately derailed in the Senate, it was a sign of growing momentum as more Republicans speak out about what's best for our nation, not just a political party. What we are doing together is making a difference! Last week, we saw another example of courage from West Virginia's Democrat Senator Joe Manchin who stood up to his party on eliminating the filibuster. Gov. Kasich said in his : "What rankled me then, and frustrates me as I watch what’s happening to Mr. Manchin, is that critics always ask the wrong question. Instead of asking, “Why won’t those troublemakers just do as they’re told?” why not think of it this way: “If they’re willing to take this much heat, do they see something I don’t?” Courage is valued not because it’s common or easy—just the opposite. It brings risks to prosperity, reputation and even life and limb. No one wants to be in that position. Everyone would rather be loved. Therefore, when someone is willing to risk stakes that high, shouldn’t it make us pause for a moment? Taking it a step further, when someone takes a path that potentially comes with high costs, and we only respond with criticism, are we missing something amazing unfolding right before us that we say we value—courage?" | This will continue to grow and in some part, it's thanks to the work we have been doing to push back on the nonsense and instead, embrace truth and integrity. But we still have a long way to go to heal our nation's politics and refocus the GOP on offering Americans policy ideas and a hopeful vision for the future. Peter, Gov. Kasich needs your help to keep up the fight. The money we raise goes directly into our advocacy work, helping us rally more supporters to fight for our country. Anything you'd be willing to contribute to that effort is most appreciated. | Gov. Kasich was also a guest recently on HBO's 'Real Timers' with Bill Maher. He was joined by former MSNBC 'Hardball' host Chris Matthews as they discussed the state of America's politics and how both parties stand to gain from bipartisan work on our largest challenges. A HBO Max subscription is required to . | Gov. Kasich joined Lionel Richie for an Instagram Live event to highlight May as Mental Health Awareness Month. . | Finally, we wanted to share with you a column that Gov. Kasich co-authored about how the study of the human brain is the next frontier of discovery for improving our lives. . | Peter, together, we are making a real difference. Thank you for all that you're doing! -Team Kasich | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

name: Team Crist
subject: DeSantis’s GOP backers are spending big
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
and now he has $39 million in cash on hand (!!)
|
---

| | **" Ron DeSantis raises more than $7.5 million in May for re-election"**
_\-- Florida Politics_
Friend,

With the backing of national Republican donors and the support of Donald Trump's base, Ron DeSantis has built a war chest of nearly **_$39 million_**. DeSantis's extreme backers will stop at nothing to ensure he has the resources to keep Florida red.

**[Going up against the national Republican Party machine isn't going to be easy, so we need this grassroots community to step up in a big way. Every dollar will make a difference towards defeating Ron DeSantis in 2022 and helping elect Charlie Crist. Can you pitch in RIGHT NOW?](https://act.myngp.com/el/O1LC6SuP9lfFgaES-mqP7Q==/rUsNjs5iU1eZNzrPuUeZtQ==?refcode=20210615_f_1_fl&amount=25)** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

DeSantis cares solely about his own political prospects -- which means every decision he makes is meant to help _his future political career_ (not Floridians).

From signing anti-democratic **_voter suppression_** bills to **_banning_** transgender children from playing sports, Ron DeSantis is focused on what will raise Ron DeSantis money. Nothing else.

Unfortunately, **_his plan is working_**. He's raising gobs of money every month, and he's planning to spend the next few weeks holding fundraisers across the country.

He'll undoubtedly raise tens of millions more.

If we can't fight back, we'll be left in the dust.

**[But if every single person reading this email contributed just $5, we could be that much closer to closing our fundraising gap. name: Erica Smith
subject: It felt like visiting a plantation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I have some powerful photos to show you...
#
Hi again, it’s Erica!
It was another busy weekend on the road. We visited Martin County, Gates County, and Hertford County (and also went back to Elizabeth City).
I have some powerful photos to show you...
But first, I have to respectfully ask: [**_Is there any way you could please make another donation of $5 or more to help fund our 100 Counties 100 Days Tour? We won’t have enough funding to pull off the rest of this ambitious tour without raising a lot of money through emails like this one._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2860?refcode=em20210615-177&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=177%2E3698%2ENhmA0O)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2860?refcode=em20210615-177&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=177%2E3698%2ENhmA0O)**
Alright, now here’s my update from the road:
While in Hertford County, we stopped by the Rivers Correctional Facility, a recently closed private prison. **It felt like visiting a plantation.** Private prisons are utterly and entirely immoral, and they should be abolished immediately.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2860?refcode=em20210615-177&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=177%2E3698%2ENhmA0O)
We traveled across Gates County, **meeting folks where they are and making sure everyone is registered to vote.** We even made sure that local restaurants had registration papers on hand and set up.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2860?refcode=em20210615-177&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=177%2E3698%2ENhmA0O)
Finally, at our meet-and-greet at Porky’s Backyard BBQ in Martin County, we had an awesome conversation with Mayor Brown and North Carolina voters. Not to mention, some delicious BBQ.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2860?refcode=em20210615-177&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=177%2E3698%2ENhmA0O)
**We are going everywhere, meeting voters where they are, and leaving no one behind!!!** Together, we can transform our politics and make this state work for all of us.
[**_But I simply can’t do it without grassroots online support. Can you please make another donation of $5 or more to help fund the rest of our 100 Counties 100 Days Tour?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2860?refcode=em20210615-177&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=177%2E3698%2ENhmA0O)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2860?refcode=em20210615-177&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=177%2E3698%2ENhmA0O)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210615-177-footer&t=8&refcode2=177_3698_NhmA0O&akid=177%2E3698%2ENhmA0O)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=177%2E3698%2ENhmA0O)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=177%2E3698%2ENhmA0O)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

It wasn’t long ago that we had low gas prices, a roaring economy, and peace in the Middle East. As we look back on those successes under President Trump, and contrast them with the failures of the Biden and Kelly administrations, we are reminded of how important it is to elect a governor who will bring the best of an America First Agenda to Kansas. Like President Trump, Derek is focused on getting things done for Kansas and protecting our way of life from the Radical Left and its increasing influence over everything from our government to popular culture to schools from elementary all the way to colleges and universities. Today, we’re proud to reflect on the many successes of the Trump Administration. clean_body: Yesterday, we were glad to honor President Trump’s 75th birthday while reflecting on his many accomplishments that led our state and nation toward pro Friend, Yesterday, we were glad to honor President Trump’s 75th birthday while reflecting on his many accomplishments that led our state and nation toward prosperity. It wasn’t long ago that we had low gas prices, a roaring economy, and peace in the Middle East. As we look back on those successes under President Trump, and contrast them with the failures of the Biden and Kelly administrations, we are reminded of how important it is to elect a governor who will bring the best of an America First Agenda to Kansas. Now more than ever before, we need leaders who will stand up and fight back against the Radical Left. It’s clear that we need more leaders who will make economic prosperity and Kansas values their top priorities. That’s why we’re working so hard to replace Laura Kelly and elect Derek Schmidt to be our next governor. In our opinion, there is no one better to continue President Trump’s legacy of growth and progress for Kansas. Thank you for supporting our campaign to restore strong America First values to Kansas. \-- Team Schmidt \--------Forwarded Message Below------ Friend, Today is President Trump’s 75th birthday. To mark the occasion, we’ve been reflecting on the great four years Kansas saw under President Trump’s leadership. From low gas prices and a thriving economy to more support for our farmers and small businesses than ever before, the Trump administration always put Kansas and America First. When our economy thrives, so do our families. President Trump understood that, and Derek Schmidt does too. That’s why Derek proudly supports President Trump’s America First Agenda. He knows that when leaders side with workers and families over Big Government and Woke Corporations, our state and our nation succeed. Add your name here if you also support the America First Agenda: With the Biden administration taking us in the wrong direction in Washington, we need true conservative leaders like Derek Schmidt leading our state now more than ever. Like President Trump, Derek is focused on getting things done for Kansas and protecting our way of life from the Radical Left and its increasing influence over everything from our government to popular culture to schools from elementary all the way to colleges and universities. Today, we’re proud to reflect on the many successes of the Trump Administration. As we look to the future, we’re working hard to elect Derek Schmidt to the governor’s office so he can bring the best of President Trump’s America First Agenda here to Kansas and get things on the right track. Thank you for joining us in marking President Trump’s birthday and for supporting our efforts to bring the best of America First priorities and values back to Kansas. \-- Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Clown Show
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Biden's people interfering |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1f4e0081bb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

You know what? Bring in the clowns.

**Well – that’s what’s happening anyway in Arizona.**

_With 100% of the ballots counted in America’s Audit in Maricopa County, the Democrats are getting nervous and the clown show is beginning._

[_Donate TODAY to protect America’s and Arizona’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=48330f041b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d0845ab487&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| My name is Mark Finchem. I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, a proud Trump supporter, a former policeman, firefighter, and paramedic – and a patriot leading the charge in fighting election fraud, starting right here in Arizona!

**We have been fighting for a long time, overcoming legal challenges and attacks by the media for simply wanting to do an audit of the election – a right of the state of Arizona!**

_We demanded help in ensuring the sanctity of the American ballot but where was the Department of Justice then?_

**Nowhere to be found.**

But now that we are homing in on one of the biggest frauds in American history?

**Well, Attorney General Merrick Garland said it all:**

**_Merrick Garland said that the DoJ will examine any audits “to ensure they abide by federal statutory requirements to protect election records and avoid intimidation of voters.”_**

Additionally, he has already stated there will be guidance published to make sure that mail in voting and early voting are protected.

**So, let’s be clear here. We have the Department of Justice – before the audit is even completed – stating that they will make it their mission to defend two proven sources of voter fraud, early voting and mail-in ballots?**

_So you won’t get involved to protect the ballot, but you’ll get involved to destroy it?_

**Yep, bring in the clowns.**

_Even though we are making tremendous strides here in Arizona, we are a long way from ensuring the integrity of the American ballot. _

**_This is why I am running for Arizona Secretary of State. I will oversee and protect the ballot in one of the most crucial states for the electoral college._**

[But I cannot do it without your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f6b7e1ad0a&e=44b8c466b0)

I am writing you today to join one of the strongest, most exciting grassroots movement in history.

**While I am helping lead the charge, I am not the only one fighting back against Merrick Garland and these clowns!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=088a220a01&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Arizona Senator Wendy Rogers responded with fire,_a_**** _s did I._**

Political swamp creatures should never be allowed to break the law to further their own political interests.

**So sorry, Merrick, we’re not going to handle this with kid gloves when the Audit proves successful.**

We are in the middle of a movement of historical proportions fighting back against one of the largest racketeering schemes in the history of America.

**I’m sure if Crooked Merrick wants to look at the Democrats’ handling of the election, he will find plenty of convictions to meet his quota.**

_Will you join our movement?_

[_Donate TODAY to join the movement for Election Integrity and protecting the Sanctity of the Ballot!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2dd2c40519&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| My name is Mark Finchem, and I am the fighter that Arizona needs.

**Arizona has been spit on and used as a political tool by the Democrats.**

**_Where has Arizona’s voice gone? It can’t be found in the sea of Leftist Corruption, protected by the likes of Crooked Merrick Garland._**

It’s about time for a change.

**We can’t let the Democrats get away with stealing the election. **

**_Not this time. Not ever._**

This is a clown show and it’s time for the curtain call.

[_Donate TODAY to protect our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=462f876637&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=200e34a234&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b04521d388&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=84f591c679) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=84f591c679).

Peter,

California has been my home for so many years. My husband and I raised our daughters here. I served as a state legislator here, working to make this place an even more special, welcoming place for everyone.

We've struggled plenty during the pandemic, but Californians are resilient. That's why I was so thrilled to see this headline as I was reading the news yesterday:

**I do want to make one thing clear: None of this progress is due to Mike Garcia, our current representative in Congress.**

He voted against the American Rescue Plan, a COVID-19 relief bill that helped fund vaccinations, school reopenings, small businesses, and more.

He constantly criticizes policies made by the CA state legislature. He dunks on the state all the time on Twitter, talking about how it is deteriorating...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30864451/290866848/-1772004339?refcode=em21_210615_cali-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTgwZmJlYS0zN2NlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q3htYufxrsMk8bjb7Ql4PPymeDMSktCRraNTF_OSlD4=)

**[I care. I love it here, and I want to make sure CA remains a great place to live and thrive. [anthony@votejohncox.com](mailto:anthony@votejohncox.com)

### ICYMI: Beastly Momentum: John Cox in the Lead
_John Cox has emerged as the clear leader in the recall._
SAN DIEGO, CALIFORNIA—New polling by a leading national pollster shows that outsider, businessman, and all-around friendly beast John Cox has emerged as the clear leader in the recall.Cox leads by double digits in either a Republican-only field of candidates or in a field of both Democrats and Republicans.
Further, the polling showed that the energy is clearly on the side of voters who support the recall. Those likeliest to vote back the recall with 49 percent, while 46 percent oppose.Full details from the polling memo can be found below:
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=0e3eed80ae&e=b8a6795190)

[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=9d58576109&e=b8a6795190)
# # #
|
---
TV Stations interested in talking to John Cox via Zoom can reach out to the campaign by contacting Press Secretary Anthony Ramirez at [anthony@votejohncox.com](mailto:anthony@votejohncox.com).
| | | **ABOUT** John Cox is a political outsider who’ll shake up Sacramento and cut taxes. California is spiraling downward as it’s been failed by career politicians and insiders who look out for their own interests, and not those of the average Californian. John’s an outsider, who doesn’t owe the establishment anything. He understands what it’s like to scratch and claw to survive and succeed.

For more information please visit, [**johncox.com**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f9cf781143&e=b8a6795190)**** and follow @BeastJohnCox on social media.

Peter,

I came to Washington to disrupt the establishment and call out the elitist class who has ignored the working class for far too long.

subject: RELEASE: IN DEMS New Strategy: If You Can’t Beat ‘Em, Join ‘Em?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
The Indiana Republican Party, the organization that has been instrumental in turning the Hoosier State around after 16-years of Democrat debt.. | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/chairman-hupfer-statement-on-2021-indiana-inauguration-470570?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1f67066166&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | **IN DEMS New Strategy: If You Can’t Beat ‘Em, Join ‘Em? **
_**Indiana GOP actually very happy to be “stuck” with Huck**_
**INDIANAPOLIS-** The Indiana Republican Party, the organization that has been instrumental in turning the Hoosier State around after 16-years of Democrat debt and disfunction, today sympathized with the Indiana Democrat Party for trying so hard but coming up short. Again. Having been repeatedly rejected by Hoosier voters and not winning a statewide race in nearly 10 years, it comes as little surprise that they would get even the most basic things wrong, like the name of their own organization.
---
|
---
(Screenshot from release. Emphasis in original).
| Given the rising gas prices and skyrocketing inflation caused by Joe Biden and his handlers, we're happy to live rent free in the Indiana Democrats' head.

It’s quite a communicative accomplishment to send out a statement that long, mislead and misdirect with every line and then even get the title of the spokesperson wrong. Their entire release seems like it's straight out of Pravda.

So, please let us clarify: No, Matt Huckleby has not left his post as executive director of the Indiana Republican Party. During Huck’s time as executive director, the Indiana Republican Party has smashed fundraising records, won every statewide elected office, maintained supermajorities in both houses of the Indiana General Assembly, holds a record 71 mayoral offices and 88% of all county elected positions in the state, flipped Democrat Joe Donnelly's senate seat, and recently reelected Governor Eric Holcomb with the most votes ever cast for a gubernatorial candidate in Indiana history.

With that track record of excellence, the Indiana Republican Party is very happy to be “stuck” with Huck.

“I guess they’re going with an if-you-can’t-beat-them-join-them approach to leadership in the state,” said some guy we asked on the street.

“Fact-checking, getting little things right, knowing the name of your organization, you know, that all goes a long way. If they can’t get the title of their own executive director right, it’s no wonder they have trouble recruiting candidates to run for office, let alone win. But congratulations on Dr. Jennifer McCormick’s party switch! That’s a big pick up for them, I guess,” some guy we asked on the street added.

We at the Indiana Republican Party hope this clarifies any confusion caused by our Democrat friends. Even so, as a sign of Hoosier solidarity, we included a couple typos in this release.

And hey, while we’ve got you here, take a minute to read Chairman Kyle Hupfer’s op-ed, calling out Democrat bad faith attacks on the integrity of our elections: [https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2021/06/15/bad-faith_democrat_attacks_on_election_integrity_are_failing_145933.html](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=395cdd8e54&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**-30-**

body:
Hey Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw this:

Ron Johnson just vowed to do whatever he could to “frustrate the passage” of critical legislation that would provide much-needed resources to Wisconsin. He’s taking failed leadership to a whole new level, and we have to stop him. I know you understand just how important it is to give Ron Johnson the boot, so I don’t need to tell you how high the stakes are. But I do have to ask you this:

[**Can I count on you to chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help our grassroots campaign defeat Ron Johnson and flip this Senate seat blue? Anything you can give will go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30866184/290887112/1978118503?gpsid=31_130_19239&refcode=em21_210615_MM3_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210615_MM3_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTAyY2M3Yy00MmNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OCWZfzP3I2HLh430icCim7QhvozEoupFPe3N7RUOoIs=)

Thanks so much -- and keep reading below for my team’s email from earlier today. What Ron Johnson is doing is ridiculous! Let’s finally get this guy out of the Senate.

\-- Sarah Godlewski _\------ Begin forwarded message ------_ **From:** Team Sarah
**Date:** June 15, 2021
**Subject:** Proof: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30866185/290887113/1978118503?gpsid=31_130_19239&refcode=em21_210615_MM3_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210615_MM3_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTAyY2M3Yy00MmNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OCWZfzP3I2HLh430icCim7QhvozEoupFPe3N7RUOoIs=)

Ron Johnson doesn’t care about Wisconsinites, folks. Need proof? When asked if he'd support bipartisan infrastructure legislation that would rebuild our roads, reinvest in our middle class, boost job training programs, and expand broadband access, he said he’d do what he could “to frustrate its passage."

It’s not the first time Ron Johnson has slammed the door on Wisconsin families either. Remember: he tried to block $1,400 survival checks and essential COVID-19 relief. He also argued that workers should be forced off of $300 per week unemployment during the pandemic. And he said wages are rising too quickly!

If you weren't ready to replace Ron Johnson with Sarah Godlewski before this latest blunder, we hope you are now. clean_body: Hey Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw this: Ron Johnson just vowed to do whatever he could to “frustrate the passage” of critical legislation that would provide much-needed resources to Wisconsin. He’s taking failed leadership to a whole new level, and we have to stop him. I know you understand just how important it is to give Ron Johnson the boot, so I don’t need to tell you how high the stakes are. But I do have to ask you this: = Thanks so much -- and keep reading below for my team’s email from earlier today. What Ron Johnson is doing is ridiculous! Let’s finally get this guy out of the Senate. \-- Sarah Godlewski \------ Begin forwarded message ------ From: Team Sarah Date: June 15, 2021 Subject: Proof: = Ron Johnson doesn’t care about Wisconsinites, folks. Need proof? When asked if he'd support bipartisan infrastructure legislation that would rebuild our roads, reinvest in our middle class, boost job training programs, and expand broadband access, he said he’d do what he could “to frustrate its passage." It’s not the first time Ron Johnson has slammed the door on Wisconsin families either. Remember: he tried to block $1,400 survival checks and essential COVID-19 relief. He also argued that workers should be forced off of $300 per week unemployment during the pandemic. And he said wages are rising too quickly! If you weren't ready to replace Ron Johnson with Sarah Godlewski before this latest blunder, we hope you are now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Wisconsin can't succeed with a senator who cares more about what one guy in Mar-a-Lago thinks than families in Menominee. body:
#

Friends —
On Sunday, we reached out about our 72-hour fundraising drive and how important hitting our 10,000 contribution goal is.
Then yesterday, Mark reached out because he knows that if we fall short of this goal, it’s going to make hitting our 100,000 contribution end-of-quarter goal even harder.
And this morning, Mark’s Campaign Manager, Emma, reached out again because we’re still a few hundred donations short and our deadline is in just a few hours!
**So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to fall short. We’re already seeing multiple candidates enter the race and the attacks from outside groups are ramping up. So before time runs out, we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation before midnight? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 10,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210615-2-15&t=1&refcode2=807_6688874_BqKjae&akid=807%2E6688874%2EBqKjae)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210615-2-15&t=14&refcode2=807_6688874_BqKjae&akid=807%2E6688874%2EBqKjae)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210615-2-15&t=17&refcode2=807_6688874_BqKjae&akid=807%2E6688874%2EBqKjae)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210615-2-15&t=18&refcode2=807_6688874_BqKjae&akid=807%2E6688874%2EBqKjae)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210615-2-15&t=19&refcode2=807_6688874_BqKjae&akid=807%2E6688874%2EBqKjae)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hit this critical goal. Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever National Republicans decide to throw at us next as we gear up to run again in 2022.
Thank you again, we couldn’t do this without you!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210615-2-15&t=20&refcode2=807_6688874_BqKjae&akid=807%2E6688874%2EBqKjae)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=21&akid=807%2E6688874%2EBqKjae).

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 5 numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
28.94, 19.76, 51, 24.66....
#
Peter,
My team keeps sending me these five numbers, asking me to email you about them before our fundraising deadline tonight. So I finally said OK!
We need $4,136 to hit our goal by midnight, and _this_ is how my team wants us to get there: we want folks to donate one of the following amounts (or anything you can afford)!
**$28.94** : This is our average online donation so far this quarter, and we still need to raise a lot more before our FEC deadline. If just 143 supporters **[donate $28.94](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3426?amount=28.94%3Brefcode%3Dem20210615-377&t=1&akid=377%2E420207%2Er_rSR7)** we’ll hit our midnight goal!
**$19.76** : The Medicare for All bill that I introduced this year is H.R. 1976. A **[$19.76 donation](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3426?amount=19.76%3Brefcode%3Dem20210615-377&t=2&akid=377%2E420207%2Er_rSR7)** supports our fight to guarantee health care as a human right for every single person in this country — no co-pays, no premiums, no deductibles, period.
**$51** : That’s the number of votes it should take to pass a bill in the Senate! Not 60. **[Donating $51 today](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3426?amount=51%3Brefcode%3Dem20210615-377&t=3&akid=377%2E420207%2Er_rSR7)** helps us fight to end the filibuster and pass a long list of critical bills to protect our democracy and invest in people and our communities.
Last one! **$24.66** : This is the average online donation our team has received since opening our online account back in 2015. So much has happened since then, and I will continue to fight for the people in every way I can. **[If you can contribute $24.66](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3426?amount=24.66%3Brefcode%3Dem20210615-377&t=4&akid=377%2E420207%2Er_rSR7)** , we need just 167 supporters to do the same to help us reach our goal.
[**So, if you can, Peter, please contribute one of the dollar amounts above, $3, or anything you can before midnight to help us reach our critical fundraising goal.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3426?refcode=em20210615-377&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=377%2E420207%2Er_rSR7)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3426?refcode=em20210615-377&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=377%2E420207%2Er_rSR7)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210615-377-footer&t=25&refcode2=377_420207_r_rSR7&akid=377%2E420207%2Er_rSR7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
