name: Castorani, John
subject: Hillary Clinton's lies cost American lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Congress
body:
For six years I hunted islamic terrorists in norther Africa who perpetrated the attacks on Benghazi. Now, I'm running for Congress Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=c2427ec8e19c4b6b9a3c0bb19fc2500b&_t=CbNMfbxwP_pHwOtw8M3nMBHM2eaVB3tdrh83lNFRNlJpSyH-UlDbQoDRrvyDeiudiZsP88204-0-KeNcCPe1Q_EtSCTg7DtsoSzChCPElWRE5xBGZJJhtKJem5mKhK8rLfHEb6xHshJF2djR4ysW-7-nMMJImrq4oJOUGmLVrB8%3D) | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c2427ec8e19c4b6b9a3c0bb19fc2500b&_e=hsQh6_GYuEytGhZR7R46qUxIDhEoFyLa-q_09SzdWICv3EW61VYTDLjBoVA5XN6J1o156LT9zqAaRkgaMkBx0qak1YUMCDodYOIiVL_Spfh0uZ0iO7AQ-E_U8y-9SvAIyPK29jvQhuyhp5aN3xdJbjpuW42cXHDGH1N_8kg3iAui3h-LHqFqiiIAcTb9IiTHCi-ArcJfUSm-6552Oc5N3oWs7PM20QeyG0OMbalJv-im20Vn_EGCg7gkfV8Mq-NXnjKpWficyEYeV-kGBpsvsKIDD1kvUKZQECvcfqeZZRJO0WmNen_nOnWLHQNFQRJPKtNGajSNlq9OydbOZpG7KbXv3DUjM6vL2V4SY67qZmB_b-wjKA-QHaVJruNKm3F-I2I78ah-j75aE-CZtHFGGZLvBHajglCAOTtHHq8uVRwwPUf4QsspKpqpejbDKl5Nd0GkhOoeJy40KHsePdPH37SD8e5Kargmn44we2KSBrc%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c2427ec8e19c4b6b9a3c0bb19fc2500b&_e=hsQh6_GYuEytGhZR7R46qUxIDhEoFyLa-q_09SzdWICv3EW61VYTDLjBoVA5XN6J1o156LT9zqAaRkgaMkBx0qak1YUMCDodYOIiVL_Spfh0uZ0iO7AQ-E_U8y-9SvAIyPK29jvQhuyhp5aN3xdJbjpuW42cXHDGH1N_8kg3iAui3h-LHqFqiiIAcTb9IiTHCi-ArcJfUSm-6552Oc5N3oWs7PM20QeyG0OMbalJv-im20Vn_EGCg7gkfV8Mq-NXnjKpWficyEYeV-kGBpsvsDercIfslT7BotPHkSwwFMtreoXfWwfUb7aTjI9KOAjbXXdaIDq-rpTmE9jdGbpCy2WaBH7YBzZf19GtJPiVIto-FuDgG6HUr_4Gjik9dMFzTS5lK5OmvSYR9ns-F7DlEu2_nGeAVeOolrkxCOjsmWtwDqKftjbli9dHH-Z7x4aZeQscCxwQTjK79vjXoKOyT-EjKVsQiTJAeDfT7qwkMIM%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c2427ec8e19c4b6b9a3c0bb19fc2500b&_e=hsQh6_GYuEytGhZR7R46qUxIDhEoFyLa-q_09SzdWICv3EW61VYTDLjBoVA5XN6J1o156LT9zqAaRkgaMkBx0qak1YUMCDodYOIiVL_Spfh0uZ0iO7AQ-E_U8y-9SvAIyPK29jvQhuyhp5aN3xdJbjpuW42cXHDGH1N_8kg3iAui3h-LHqFqiiIAcTb9IiTHCi-ArcJfUSm-6552Oc5N3oWs7PM20QeyG0OMbalJv-im20Vn_EGCg7gkfV8Mq-NXnjKpWficyEYeV-kGBpsvsA_516lqM8F5L2NlJR4lEeD0iGqCsruINjrAPZA9te0BpxPON5WhkM5BGY-LuUQYRwPYvTpuN3SWWkOTXycZvocssWCHGLJSQSlLQjOwPs3JRg3g6Ksv9PWoztk4g1s4Em8SycdigrWY3CvzWEOz1GNITg_UlTq85fMQLxmhpULVk2M_JJkfKWk9DIpBxQBR210C13jJRC-fT4RW2dCCYus%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c2427ec8e19c4b6b9a3c0bb19fc2500b&_e=hsQh6_GYuEytGhZR7R46qUxIDhEoFyLa-q_09SzdWICv3EW61VYTDLjBoVA5XN6J1o156LT9zqAaRkgaMkBx0qak1YUMCDodYOIiVL_Spfh0uZ0iO7AQ-E_U8y-9SvAIyPK29jvQhuyhp5aN3xdJbjpuW42cXHDGH1N_8kg3iAui3h-LHqFqiiIAcTb9IiTHCi-ArcJfUSm-6552Oc5N3oWs7PM20QeyG0OMbalJv-im20Vn_EGCg7gkfV8Mq-NXnjKpWficyEYeV-kGBpsvsEsbZbxC3DbzyBki9DSPw70FFu2hBLc4BOzqPU9XMm8q3BXaguQ8g1FbKyUT8ZK8mpct4xh7Ar-J47HXYe24WKl-AYBVQlkQYDfssBOnJCIWDIouX1At3nFig76G9HXqg8oqAguUhZ102qaB89rRkPpFOVC9_rj3DspuLAQQk5c5lDuGDfEk1Tx9hRe3bbwptPi6V8HXyzUNxmERUeskyhU%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c2427ec8e19c4b6b9a3c0bb19fc2500b&_e=hsQh6_GYuEytGhZR7R46qUxIDhEoFyLa-q_09SzdWICv3EW61VYTDLjBoVA5XN6J1o156LT9zqAaRkgaMkBx0qak1YUMCDodYOIiVL_Spfh0uZ0iO7AQ-E_U8y-9SvAIyPK29jvQhuyhp5aN3xdJbjpuW42cXHDGH1N_8kg3iAui3h-LHqFqiiIAcTb9IiTHCi-ArcJfUSm-6552Oc5N3oWs7PM20QeyG0OMbalJv-im20Vn_EGCg7gkfV8Mq-NXnjKpWficyEYeV-kGBpsvsCrrCZu6X_nWfPFsrF0__sPSaudNPWcXjdITRlqCIRBa58M1fnRL5pQeFqQBRcoWZhRsdAtqK9w8Rsc0ljJq_rhOyza8l5ZIyCIBnDK---2uqFOB4khapDgGYSlJ1SzKoZr0uyiK7F-xJeS42RHCEgtvgEQOs2U5PacKCHGB8u2DeTOh_sPckXfuZz0CHtSGffRVASbYoQ4T3yp_OuhS7gs%3D)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c2427ec8e19c4b6b9a3c0bb19fc2500b&_e=hsQh6_GYuEytGhZR7R46qUxIDhEoFyLa-q_09SzdWICv3EW61VYTDLjBoVA5XN6J1o156LT9zqAaRkgaMkBx0qak1YUMCDodYOIiVL_Spfh0uZ0iO7AQ-E_U8y-9SvAIyPK29jvQhuyhp5aN3xdJbjpuW42cXHDGH1N_8kg3iAui3h-LHqFqiiIAcTb9IiTHCi-ArcJfUSm-6552Oc5N3oWs7PM20QeyG0OMbalJv-im20Vn_EGCg7gkfV8Mq-NXnjKpWficyEYeV-kGBpsvsC2s01jeiS4R41hSaLgN_v7sPbZ7_-5GLcFalHMz_YfHzTWvztAPlSPJlLE8TKGmZ0s31zdRieJbW-sXoVT263M80grtbHI4br1KvVtNmvoXPxuqfcJy3ljsrbbT6Ij3xFFtB_i2McvHqXFuoFiRRb_YcUfcIOafQ-fa7Hzgn7Q8b2pJWNzoykZKyx0sUaFMDH6Kx__tWxE0UVhwoE4b384%3D) **

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c2427ec8e19c4b6b9a3c0bb19fc2500b&_e=hsQh6_GYuEytGhZR7R46qUxIDhEoFyLa-q_09SzdWICv3EW61VYTDLjBoVA5XN6J1o156LT9zqAaRkgaMkBx0qak1YUMCDodYOIiVL_Spfh0uZ0iO7AQ-E_U8y-9SvAIyPK29jvQhuyhp5aN3xdJbjpuW42cXHDGH1N_8kg3iAui3h-LHqFqiiIAcTb9IiTHCi-ArcJfUSm-6552Oc5N3oWs7PM20QeyG0OMbalJv-im20Vn_EGCg7gkfV8Mq-NXnjKpWficyEYeV-kGBpsvsM8SToBSlNujR9XsdL5cjlvPpX-hI1yoFIxzcvhc3uXqSImBcncT8WR_UWGY3kU7OsOtlBxe7MR6pcGJFXZq_OO0MXDl1oL26N_FBOnuAivz0G0XPXauNzpMxSv460Uku2uti-f-fTSzddDNV84UEXJcwknkyQ8PsRrxEaL6tth-uDwZK0snPYh3Wbi-CQwx4xeL-zf0VbtT3WJCKvlT1tc%3D)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. I’m running to hold these bureaucrats accountable and I hope you’ll help put some wind in my sails by donating $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c2427ec8e19c4b6b9a3c0bb19fc2500b&_e=hsQh6_GYuEytGhZR7R46qUxIDhEoFyLa-q_09SzdWICv3EW61VYTDLjBoVA5XN6J1o156LT9zqAaRkgaMkBx0qak1YUMCDodYOIiVL_Spfh0uZ0iO7AQ-E_U8y-9SvAIyPK29jvQhuyhp5aN3xdJbjpuW42cXHDGH1N_8kg3iAui3h-LHqFqiiIAcTb9IiTHCi-ArcJfUSm-6552Oc5N3oWs7PM20QeyG0OMbalJv-im20Vn_EGCg7gkfV8Mq-NXnjKpWficyEYeV-kGBpsvsOXw8xHF4buEb4z0y01c-O4F9Ln0W3kKbitrpwD_1t2WxLIbtoTtyAgnwkNAbaSbV7TJHHQEnkxyuLfP8gsYQkQA3e3ejnxW_obrF7Ucbsyg-4N_QrK7BEDtEU4sn03ir01P0Yt1nV21LYjWvDsDS1TNdSr8Nh1DnL_vplgFURCErYblf3jj2QsCalK-QVStA-Sfkp93Fm-eCuVPg6MZwcc%3D)**.

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_

clean_body: For six years I hunted islamic terrorists in norther Africa who perpetrated the attacks on Benghazi. Now, I'm running for Congress Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. We have to fight for it. | Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason At the time of the Benghazi attacks, Hillary Clinton knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally. . In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Congress

| Fellow Patriot,
Did you know YOUR TAX DOLLARS are funding the Left’s plot to brainwash and re-program young kinds with Marxist Critical Race Theory preaching that...
* **White students are oppressors and inherently racist** ,

* **America is a hateful, racist country** , AND

Tammy Duckworth (D-Ill.), Dan Sullivan (R-Ark.) and Chris Coons (D-Del.) visited Taiwan on Sunday.” –– The Hill [READ] The bottom line: “ The International Olympic Committee (IOC) has given China the honor of hosting the 2022 Winter Olympics, just as it allowed Nazi Germany to host the Summer Olympics in 1936. But although the international community may not have understood the full extent of Hitler’s crimes and intentions in 1936, the CCP’s crimes against the Uyghurs and its escalating human rights abuses throughout mainland China—not to mention the destruction of civil liberties in Hong Kong—are well documented.” –– Foreign Policy ALERT: CONGRESSMAN GALLAGHER IS CALLING ON THE IOC TO MOVE THE 2022 OLYMPICS OUT OF CHINA. WILL YOU ADD YOUR NAME TO JOIN MIKE? | [WATCH] The bottom line: “ FBI Director Christopher Wray said the agency was investigating about 100 different types of ransomware, many tracing back to hackers in Russia, and compared the current spate of cyberattacks with the challenge posed by the Sept. 11, 2001, terrorist attacks. “There are a lot of parallels, there’s a lot of importance, and a lot of focus by us on disruption and prevention,” Mr. Wray said in an interview Thursday. “There’s a shared responsibility, not just across government agencies but across the private sector and even the average American.” –– The Wall Street Journal Thank you, Gallagher Foreign Policy HQ | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |
